name: Gold
description: Stylish and practical, no one expects the Cane Sword to also be lethal. Yohji is never seen without it.

name: Chip
description: Seikyu Casino chips are needed to play all the games in the casino. They're also a collector's item, as tourists bring them home for luck!

name: Talisman
description: Stylish and practical, no one expects the Cane Sword to also be lethal. Yohji is never seen without it.

name: Watering Can
description: Irrigation tool. A nifty piece of equipment that allows you to water crops at your leisure.

name: Yokai's Wooden Sword
description: A practice sword for basic training. Although it's not quite the real deal, it's no plaything.

name: Hero's Iron Sword
description: A practice sword for advanced training. Sharpened for a real combat feel, it's a common weapon choice for warriors.

name: Oni's Club
description: Commonly used by oni. Despite its appearance, it hits just as hard as any regular weapon, and inflicts just as much pain.

name: Yokai's Wooden Hammer
description: A favorite among yokai warriors. Swinging it alone makes its wielder a menacing nuisance. Be mindful of your energy when using this weapon.

name: Hero's Stone Hammer
description: A practice hammer for advanced training. Comes with an anti-slip handle for a more reliable grip, it's a common weapon choice for warriors.

name: Massive Ore Crushing Pickaxe
description: A common mining tool. Although rarely employed for fighting, it's more than up to the task if needed.

name: Karma Fire Wheel
description: Red steel-forged bones with twelve spokes, engraved with the rebirth mantra. Each sweep of the wheel leaves a karma spark in the shadow of gears. It whispers as it marks your soul.

name: Iron Shovel
description: A common farming shovel. Although rarely employed for fighting, it will get the job done in a pinch.

name: Iron Pitchfork
description: A common farming pitchfork. Although not intended as a weapon, it gets the job done in a pinch.

name: Broom
description: A common household broom. Although rarely employed for fighting, it can get rid of more than just dust.

name: Basic Rod
description: Fishing tool made of humble but resilient bamboo. Despite its simplicity, it satisfies most fishing needs.

name: Fine Iron Axe
description: This axe is forged from refined iron. It is not only sharp, but also sturdy and durable.

name: Dororo, the Black Sword
description: The favored weapon of the legendary swordsman Hyakkimaru. Crafted in memory of his companion, Dororo, this unassuming sword has a nice grip and sports a curved blade.

name: Ani
description: A scythe forged from a miraculous metal that reflects no light. Swinging this scythe creates a black hole that devours light, a shadowy harbinger of death to enemies.

name: Phantom, the Yokai Blade
description: A fabled sword that brings carnage and calamity. It emits a purple glow and is covered with mysterious runes. The handle is wrapped in dark leather with sinister symbols.

name: Giant Deep Sea Anchor
description: A not-so-rusty anchor salvaged from an unknown vessel. While ordinary people struggle to even budge it, the anchor can be a formidable weapon for stronger warriors.

name: Steel Fang
description: Inspired by the saber-toothed tiger, it embodies the pinnacle of ergonomic design. Promises great power for tall and short users alike.

name: Twin Tusks
description: A pair of ancient blades with an esoteric design. Resembling boar tusks, they boast a primitive and fierce look. Their true power is unleashed in the thick of melee combat.

name: Tear Swallower
description: A gift to Kinntarou from his father, Tear Swallower is crafted by a genius blacksmith, who imbued the weapon with all his love and loss.

name: Decayed Greatsword
description: A piece of scrap metal picked up from a flea market. So eroded it's practically useless, no discerning warrior would stake their life on such a weapon.

name: Nodachi
description: A long blade that gleams coldly, having witnessed many battles. An unnecessarily large weapon, it's often kept as a sacred offering symbolizing courage, honor and tradition.

name: Kikuichimonji Blade
description: Though a mere replica, this weapon still exudes elegance. Sleek and smooth, the blade is beautiful like chrysanthemums. Its sharp edge evokes the chill of winter.

name: Grand Drum Mallet
description: Once used by priests in an ancient ceremony that reached a peak with the beating of a drum. To the untrained eye, it's nothing but a simple blunt weapon.

name: Lumberjack Axe
description: A common tool used by lumberjacks. Though not designed for battle, it can get the job done in a pinch.

name: Black Bamboo Scythe
description: Said to be the scythe of Susanoo when he fought in human form. This is merely a replica made according to legend, but people believe that divine power can make any weapon invincible.

name: Chuunin Sickle
description: Standard issue for those who pass the Chūnin Selection Exam. Its mass production style and modest looks scream mediocrity. Want a better weapon, then prove yourself!

name: Viper Fang
description: A poisonous blade of conspiracy. Forged with venom and the choice of assassins, this blade kills like a viper sinking its fangs into its prey.

name: Chained Teeth
description: A pair of exotically-shaped weapons. The multiple edges of the serrated blades cause maximum damage. Most warriors that wield them specialize in flashy swordplay.

name: Breath of Water
description: A magical tachi blade infused with the power of flowing water. Wield it and call upon the might of the water god. However, it's a hassle wringing out your clothes after battle.

name: Breath of Fire
description: A magical tachi blade infused with the power of the flame. Wield it and call upon the might of the fire god. Be careful not to singe your hair in battle!

name: Flaming Sword
description: A one-handed sword blazing with flames. Crafted using drawings introduced by Western knights. The sword excels in melee and spews flames from distance.

name: Golden Sword
description: Made entirely of gold, the Golden Sword flaunts the wielder’s affluence. Dazzling, it is perhaps more suitable as a decoration than a weapon.

name: Crystal Sword
description: A weapon crafted from the crystals of stone giants. The blade has heft and demands much from its wielder. Only the mightiest warriors can unlock its full potential.

name: Sword in the Stone
description: Legend has it that King Arthur drew it from a stone. Naturally, this is merely a replica. An imitation it may be, but it's not to be trifled with.

name: Advanced Fishing Rod
description: A lightweight, durable rod designed for seasoned anglers. Perfect for rare fish with its pressure-resistant line system.

name: Professional Fishing Rod
description: A master-crafted rod made of spirit wood and energy lines, ideal for deep-sea giants and rare species.

name: Special Fish Bait
description: Fish can hardly resist this extra-magnetic bait, ensuring catches are reeled in much faster. One bait is consumed for each fish successfully caught.

name: Rare Fish Bait
description: This single-use bait is specially crafted for catching rare fish. Every fishing trip will bring in a worthwhile haul.

name: Bountiful Catch Bait
description: Extend the harvest feeling to fishing by using this bait to catch two fish at once. This bait can be crafted in the backpack and is reusable.

name: Super Bountiful Catch Bait
description: Advanced bait for true fishing experts, granting the chance to catch four fish at once. This bait can be crafted in the backpack and is reusable.

name: Rainy Day Bait
description: Special bait that simulates the atmosphere of rainy weather and entices rain-only fish to bite. Craftable in the backpack and reusable.

name: Snowy Day Bait
description: Very special bait infused with a chilling aura that awakens the activity of snowy-weather fish. This bait can be crafted in the backpack and is resuable.

name: Treasure Chest Bait
description: Special single-use bait that catches more than just fish - it increases the chance to reel in a mysterious treasure chest! Crafted in the backpack, this disappears after use.

name: Underwater Treasure Chest
description: A different kind of catch! Hook this chest while fishing and see what treasure lies inside.

name: Basic Fish Bait
description: Special bait for fishing enthusiasts, slightly increasing fishing efficiency. Produced by the Bug Bait Box, one bait is enough for one successfully-caught fish.

name: Treasure Hunter Bait
description: Bait designed specifically for treasure hunting, increasing the chance to catch treasure chests. This bait can be crafted in the backpack and is reusable.

name: Nighttime Bait
description: Special bait infused with the essence of night, awakening fish that are only active in darkness regardless of the time of day. Craft it in the backpack and reuse endlessly.

name: Yohji's cane
description: Stylish and practical, no one expects the Cane Sword to also be lethal. Yohji is never seen without it.

name: Muramasa
description: A blade made by the legendary craftsman Muramasa. Deadly and beautiful, it comes with a terrible price for the warrior who dares wield it.

description: Default Head

description: Default Top

name: Jinbei Kimono (Upper)
description: Comfortable, casual attire in two parts, popular among all. What it lacks in formality it makes up in practicality. Perfect for seaside residents due to its light and airy fabric.

description: Grand three-piece armor engulfed in black flames, drenched in evil. Worn by the yokai Wanyūdō who once roamed Seikyu. It is said the flames are the souls of Wanyūdō's fallen foes.

name: Wanyūdō Outfit (Upper)
description: Grand three-piece armor engulfed in black flames, drenched in evil. Worn by the yokai Wanyūdō who once roamed Seikyu. It is said the flames are the souls of Wanyūdō's fallen foes.

description: Made of tough bamboo and straw, a hat that provides samurai protection against the elements and enemies alike.

name: Samurai Outfit (Upper)
description: This armor provides excellent protection and mobility to the samurai, allowing them to fight with superior swordsmanship.

name: Samurai Outfit (Lower)
description: Made of bamboo, these leg guards are both light and sturdy, and offer excellent lower body protection.

name: Rock Outfit (Head)
description: Heavy and indestructible as a boulder, only the strongest can sport all three parts of this armor. It holds the spirit of a stone golem, a poor soul forsaken by the gods of Seikyu.

name: Rock Outfit (Upper)
description: Heavy and indestructible as a boulder, only the strongest can sport all three parts of this armor. It holds the spirit of a stone golem, a poor soul forsaken by the gods of Seikyu.

description: Three-part robes provided by shrines worshiping Inari. Only priests and priestesses are allowed to wear it. Blessed by the attire, they assume an otherworldly presence.

description: The demon slayer Momotaro had deep ties with yokai. He sealed his armor in Seikyu, to be claimed by its fated owner. It's a warrior's utmost honor to own all three parts.

description: Seikyu’s young residents mix traditional clothing with new trends, creating this three-piece set. An innovative style that has grown popular even in the outside world.

name: Seikyu's Charm (Upper)
description: Seikyu’s young residents mix traditional clothing with new trends, creating this three-piece set. An innovative style that has grown popular even in the outside world.

description: Perfect for the beauty of Seikyu's beaches. Silk and fine tailoring reveal your natural silhouette in this three-part outfit. Isn't it great to embrace nature on a hot summer day?

description: Overalls with large pockets made from sturdy denim, with matching hat and boots. The most common outfit for farmers and ranchers working in fields, it's fashionable and provides shade.

name: Tengu Mask
description:
A limited Tsukimi Festival accessory. 
Often shown with long red noses, tengu are legendary fighters known for their arrogance. Only the worthy may approach them.

name: Santan Mask
description:
A Tsukimi Festival exclusive accessory. 
Mountain spirits which dwell in the depths of Kyushu. They are said to be thick-furred cyclops.

name: Futakuchi-onna Mask
description:
A special accessory for the Tsukimi Festival. 
Yokai with an extra mouth on the back of their heads. Futakuchi-onna are born from the grudges of abused women.

name: Yokai Fox Mask
description:
A limited Tsukimi Festival accessory. 
The fox yokai were once a thriving clan in Seikyu, now surviving only in legends.

name: Kappa Mask
description:
A Tsukimi Festival exclusive accessory. 
These green yokai are rumored to live in underwater villages, with frog-like skin and bird-like beaks.

description:

Celebrating Tales of Seikyu Early Access in the Year of the Snake.

description: Seikyu is an island blessed with beautiful beaches. Put on this cute swimsuit and beachwear three-part set, and head out for a party!

description: Once owned by Wanyūdō who roamed Seikyu, the black flames burn in an ominous aura. This limited edition three-part outfit is ACE’s appreciation and gratitude for your support.

description: Once owned by Wanyūdō who roamed Seikyu, the black flames burn in an ominous aura. This limited edition three-part outfit is ACE’s appreciation and gratitude for your support.

description: Steam Summer Sale exclusive. Channel the relaxing summer vibes of Seikyu in this special two-piece outfit.

name: Summer Blossom Outfit (Lower)
description: Steam Summer Sale exclusive. Channel the relaxing summer vibes of Seikyu in this special two-piece outfit.

name: The Absolutely Fabulous Outfit (Upper)
description: As featured on the cover of Yokai World magazine, Miss Ama’s world famous Absolutely Fabulous three-part outfit will make heads turn. Definitely a must-have of the season.

name: The Absolutely Fabulous Outfit (Lower)
description: As featured on the cover of Yokai World magazine, Miss Ama’s world famous Absolutely Fabulous three-part outfit will make heads turn. Definitely a must-have of the season.

description: As featured on the cover of Yokai World magazine, Miss Ama’s world famous Absolutely Fabulous three-part outfit will make heads turn. Definitely a must-have of the season.

name: Cat-O'-Lantern Hat (Head)
description: Put on this cat-o’-lantern hat and hear the cat spirits whisper in the pumpkin fields. When the eyes flicker with festive light, mischievous souls awaken with it.

name: Pumpkin Vine Tail (Tail)
description: A lush green tail, completing the pumpkin theme with its cute curl that sways in the moonlight. Wear it with a kind heart and it will protect you.

name: Lantern Spirit Hat (Head)
description: Threaded with flames, this witch’s hat carries the essence of an ancient spirit. In the gentle night’s wind, look closely and you’ll spot a flickering smile.

name: Spirit Ribbon Tail (Tail)
description: This witch’s tail is like your familiar, it stays with you and keeps a watchful eye... sometimes peering deep into the hearts of those closest to you.

name: Special Santa Hat (Head)
description: ‘Tis the season for a gorgeous Santa hat! Channel the spirit of Christmas when you wear this classic red hat with two pom-poms, gingerbread, stars, and bells.

name: Christmas Ribbon Tail (Tail)
description: You’ll be a tempting gift to be unwrapped with this festive tail decoration! A small bell gently chimes your presence, and the ribbons flutter as you walk.

name: Christmas Tree Hat (Head)
description: You’ll be the adorable present under the Christmas tree with this hat! Strung with lights and topped by a star, it recreates the warm joy of the season.

name: Festive Fir Tail (Tail)
description: Turn your tail into a Christmas tree with this decoration! Complete with holly, ribbons, and fresh pine, it captures the excitement of presents and family.

name: Ashigaru Armor (Head)
description: The "Ashigaru Headband" is a classic piece of samurai headgear designed to protect the head from injury. Crafted from sturdy metal, it's both compact and lightweight.

name: Tanuki Hat
description: A magical cloak used by tanuki who are yet to transform. Made of supple leather and adorned with mysterious runes, the cloak can conceal the true form of its wearer.

name: Wedding Attire (Head)
description: Refined and eye-catching, this traditional headpiece has been used in weddings for centuries. A crucial component of the three-part wedding outfit.

name: Wedding Attire (Top)
description: Silky and understated, this kimono lends an atmosphere of love and honor to whoever wears it. A vital and complementary part of the three-piece wedding outfit.

name: Wedding Attire (Bottom)
description: The bottom half of this kimono flows like water, forming a regal and elegant silhouette. A vital and complementary part of the three-piece wedding outfit.

name: Wreath of Water
description: Crafted with crystal and jade, the headgear emits a soft glow. It's as if an ethereal stream circles the wearer's head, evoking the cool mountain spring water.

name: Ninja Armor (Head)
description: A mask sharp and sleek, projecting a cool ferocity. Standard ninja attire for concealing oneself on secret missions. Not merely decorative, but also a symbol of a ninja's identity.

name: Rōnin Light Armor (Head)
description: Woven from tough grass or bamboo, the hat is popular among rōnin and lone warriors, offering shelter from the wind and rain. Despite its simple design, it projects strength.

name: Strategist's Armor (Head)
description: Typically worn by strategists of great wisdom and courage, who have garnered fame through victory. Perfect for keeping warm whilst exuding a scholarly air.

name: Undefeated General's Armor (Head)
description: Once worn by a battle-hardened general, coveted for its victory-boosting power. The complex metal adornments demonstrate the general's majesty.

name: White Fox Mask
description: Commonly used in shrine ceremonies, worn by priests. The mask depicts a white fox, its eyes clear and purposeful, exuding a mysterious yet graceful air.

name: Vagabond Cloak
description: An essential item for vagabonds, providing basic protection and a semblance of security. Hopelessly helpless, they forge ahead shouldering their fate.

name: Ashigaru Armor (Upper)
description: The "Ashigaru Armor" is a classic piece of samurai gear designed to protect the wearer from sharp weapons. Crafted from sturdy metal, it's both compact and lightweight.

name: Armor of Substitution
description: Though made of common material, the legendary armor is said to be able to endure a fatal attack. It's said to have been blessed by powerful priests.

name: Ninja Armor (Upper)
description: A garment of sleek lines and an ever sleeker appearance. Standard ninja attire for concealing oneself on secret missions. Not merely decorative, but also a symbol of a ninja's identity.

name: Rōnin Light Armor (Upper)
description: Made of tough leather and linen, this armor is popular among rōnin and lone warriors, offering shelter from the wind and rain. Despite its simple design, the armor projects toughness.

name: Strategist's Armor (Upper)
description: Typically worn by strategists of great wisdom and courage, who have garnered fame through victory. Perfect for keeping warm whilst showcasing a scholarly air.

name: Phoenix Armor (Upper)
description: Fabled phoenix patterned armor, boasting immortal power. The phoenix symbolizes eternity and rebirth. This armor is both battle gear and a sacred talisman.

name: Undefeated General's Armor (Upper)
description: Once worn by a battle-hardened general, coveted for its victory-boosting power. The complex metal adornments demonstrate the general's majesty.

name: Juban Armor (White)
description: Worn underneath your clothes, the Juban Armor is discreet and practical, keeping you protected and comfortable. Its materials are a well-kept trade secret. Available in multiple colors.

name: Juban Armor (Black)
description: Worn underneath your clothes, the Juban Armor is discreet and practical, keeping you protected and comfortable. Its materials are a well-kept trade secret. Available in multiple colors.

name: Yokaistone Ring
description: Made of yokaistone fragments, this ring boosts the wearer's endurance and energy. It might look rough around the edges, but it is surprisingly comfortable to wear.

name: Lucky Black Cat Ring
description: Featuring a black cat, the ring is popular among teenage girls. It's said to make the wearer irresistible.

name: Fūma's Ring
description: Belongs to Fūma Kotarō, who executed many tough missions. The ring has pride of place in his family's prized collection.

name: Sun Wheel Ring
description: A ring symbolizing power and victory, made of gold with a dazzling sun jewel. It's like having the sun at your fingertips.

name: Kappa's Affection Ring
description: A lovelorn kappa waits underwater for its destined lover. Owning this ring makes you the soulmate of a kappa, not that that's much to be happy about...

name: Shadow Dancer's Ring
description: A ring said to possess mysterious powers, granting the wearer skills and speed. It moves through the darkness like a phantom.

name: Mountain Witch's Heart Ring
description: A ring made of a mountain witch's heart, able to steel even the most cowardly. Mountain witches have almost been hunted to extinction.

name: Yokai Affinity Ring
description: A gift from foxes to their beloved, the ring bestows the wearer a portion of Fox Clan power. They are extremely rare since the disappearance of the Fox Clan.

name: Amaterasu Amulet
description: A sacred charm imbued with the power of the sun goddess. Fills the wearer with warmth, boosting courage and confidence. The ancestors relied on Amaterasu's power to dispel darkness.

name: Miner's Amulet
description: Typically worn by miners, featuring a fine hemp rope with various ores, believed to ensure their safety while working.

name: True Love Ring
description: A diamond set in a circle of flowing silver, this ring expresses the everlasting bond between lovers.

name: Lumberjack's Amulet
description: Typically worn by lumberjacks, featuring a fine hemp rope with acorns and pinecones, believed to make their work more effective.

name: Susanoo's Amulet
description: Used for exorcisms, the amulet hosts the might of Susanoo. It purifies the wearer and dispels evil spirits. Susanoo is the god of war and blesses the wearer with his favor.

name: Phoenix Armor (Amulet)
description: An amulet with phoenix engravings, boasting immortal power. The phoenix symbolizes eternity and rebirth. Wearing it brings divine protection.

name: Gambler's Amulet
description: Worn by gamblers for good luck. It's more ceremonial than functional. How can it work when the house always wins?

name: Kappa's Affection Necklace
description: A lovelorn kappa waits underwater for its destined lover. Possessing this ring makes you the soulmate of a kappa, not that that's much to be happy about...

name: Inari Amulet
description: Inari is the goddess of prosperity and worldly success. Priests imbued this amulet with blessings at the Inari Ceremony. A must-have for merchants who long for Inari's favor.

name: Zori
description: Common straw sandals used in the countryside. Crafted from hemp rope by kind-hearted aunts. They're cheap to make, though not very durable.

name: Geta
description: Carved from solid wood, the uneven texture on the soles help increase traction. This footwear has a long history in Seikyu, often worn by priests.

name: Ashigaru Armor (Lower)
description: Classic samurai footwear. Crafted from sturdy metal, they're both compact and lightweight, and offer protection from sharp weapons.

name: Ninja Armor (Lower)
description: Footwear as lightweight as they are simple. Standard ninja attire for concealing oneself on secret missions. Not merely decorative, but also a symbol of a ninja's identity.

name: Rōnin Light Armor (Lower)
description: Made of tough leather and hardwood, popular among rōnin and lone warriors, sparing them from barefoot travel. Despite their simple design, they project strength.

name: Strategist's Armor (Lower)
description: Typically worn by strategists of great wisdom and courage, who have garnered fame through victory. Perfect for keeping warm whilst showcasing a scholarly air.

name: Undefeated General's Armor (Lower)
description: Once worn by a revered battle-hardened general. The complex metal adornments demonstrate the general's majestic presence.

name: Phoenix Armor (Lower)
description: Fabled phoenix patterned footwear, boasting immortal power. The phoenix symbolizes eternity and rebirth. These boots aren't just footwear, they're also a sacred talisman.

name: Green Koinobori
description: Reward for reaching the 0% tier in Torleone's Koinobori Challenge.

name: Blue Koinobori
description: Reward for reaching the 25% tier in Torleone's Koinobori Challenge.

name: Red Koinobori
description: Reward for reaching the 50% tier in Torleone's Koinobori Challenge.

name: Black Koinobori
description: Reward for reaching the 75% tier in Torleone's Koinobori Challenge.

name: Rainbow Koinobori
description: Reward for reaching the 100% tier in Torleone's Koinobori Challenge.

name: Carp Festival Golden Egg
description: The prized reward from the Golden Egg Hunt event at the Carp Festival. Open it for a surprise!

name: Wood
description: A basic resource obtained by chopping down trees. Seikyu trees are plentiful and robust, ideal for all crafting needs!

name: Stone
description: Obtained by mining rocks. Used to craft various furniture.

name: Clay
description: A basic resource obtained by mining rocks. It is a raw material for crafting all kinds of furniture and workshop facilities.

name: Copper Ore
description: Obtained by mining copper deposits. Used for smelting copper.

name: Iron Ore
description: Obtained by mining iron deposits. Used for smelting iron.

name: Gold Ore
description: Obtained by mining gold deposits. Used for smelting gold.

name: Raw Meat
description: Obtained by hunting wild boars. Common meat resource, used for cooking.

name: Bird's Egg
description: Stolen from bird nests. Used for cooking.

name: Yokai Shroom
description: Rare wild mushroom. Legend has it they are grown with yokai power. A very rare cooking ingredient.

name: Shiitake Mushroom
description: A delicious mushroom often found in the wild. Used for cooking.

name: Flint
description: Obtained by mining flint deposits. Used for crafting stoves and smelting furnaces.

name: Man-Eating Plant Leaf
description: Man-eating plants drop their leaves in combat. They can be used to craft special items.

name: Hardwood
description: High-grade resource obtained by chopping down trees. Used for crafting brewing barrels and tofu presses.

name: Resin
description: Sometimes obtained by chopping down trees. Useful for crafting many items.

name: Slime Sludge
description: Obtained by hunting slimes. Ingredient for crafting slime surprise boxes.

name: Bamboo
description: Obtained by cutting bamboo. Used for crafting crab and fish traps.

name: Explosive Flame
description: Obtained by hunting lantern flames. Used for crafting powder kegs.

name: Energy Crystal
description: Loot obtained hunting stone giants. Contains formidable yokai power.

name: Straw Doll
description: Loot obtained from hunting the Nioh. It contains powerful yokai energy and is useful for many functional items.

name: Spice Rock
description: A stone for food preparation. Full of rich spice flavors. Birds can't stand it.

name: Stone Golem Core
description: Loot obtained from hunting stone golems. It emits yokai energy that draws animals near.

name: Bobo Pearl
description: A rare gemstone produced by Bobo Clams in deep waters. These pearls emanate a soft light that resembles moonlight. Their unique beauty has made them popular in fashion.

name: Kappa's Keepsake
description: A strange-looking stone... Seems to be related to the kappas. But what does it do?

name: Pearl
description: A precious gem from shellfish, used in jewelry and decorations. Famous for its round shape and unique sheen. Mysterious in nature, it may bring adventures and miracles.

name: Sulfur Ore
description: A sulfur-rich ore used for extracting sulfur. A key ingredient for making gunpowder.

name: Thatch
description: A common natural resource made from dried crop stalks. A versatile material, it can be used in construction, packaging, crafts and agriculture.

name: Milk
description: Nutritious milk produced locally in Seikyu. Rich in protein and calcium, great for children and the elderly.

name: Dark Man-Eating Plant Leaf
description: Nini's leaves. You can faintly sense the formidable magical power.

name: Wool
description: Collected from the native goats of Seikyu. Soft in texture, it's lightweight yet warm. Sewing factories around the world highly favor this type of wool.

name: Golden Poop
description: Produced by Seikyu's legendary species, the capybara. It looks indistinguishable from actual gold... Wait, could this really be!?

name: Ibis Egg
description: Laid by the Ibis, a rare species found in Seikyu, it is much larger and more valuable than a chicken egg. Let's preserve biodiversity across the globe!

name: Chicken Egg
description: A product from the local Seikyu chicken breed. Eggs are the most common ingredient, rich in various nutrients. They can be used to prepare a wide range of dishes and desserts.

name: Manure
description: Looks like the animals ate well yesterday! Their manure is great for fertilizing land.

name: Chicken Feather
description: Chickens in Seikyu have a chance to drop high-quality feathers perfect for making beautiful outfits.

name: Cow Bristles
description: Cows in Seikyu are able to produce high-quality bristles that are useful for crafting furniture.

name: Goat Horn
description: Goats in Seikyu produce horns that are sought-after for crafting powerful weapons.

name: Ibis Feather
description: The beautiful feathers from the Ibis can be given to Miss Ama to make wonderful outfits.

name: Sparkling Golden Droppings
description: You won't believe your eyes! The legendary Seikyu capybara has a rare chance to produce sparkling golden droppings.

name: Evil Fang
description: Obtained from oni plaguing the Fox Ruins. Even defeated, a dark power emanates from the fang.

name: Oil Lamp Wick
description: Hard-defended and won from the Abura-sumashi deep in the ruins. Keep this wick away from fire until the right moment!

name: Eye Core
description: Obtained by defeating the fearsome Mekurabe. This eye core seems to follow you around the room, even though it’s long-released from its socket...

name: Red Panda Fur
description: Soft and vibrant, this fur is ideal for weaving cloth and adding comfort to your furniture.

name: Preserved Apple
description: Rare and valuable, this type of apple comes only from the Red Panda! It's not only a special gift, it can also create cute pet decorations!

name: Fox Scroll
description: This scroll holds your true fox form, taken from you when you were just a pup.

name: Human Scroll
description: This scroll holds Kon’s true human form, taken from her when she was just a pup.

name: Obsidian
description: A resource obtained from mining rare obsidian ore. Can be used to craft highly valuable items.

name: Yuki-onna Scroll
description:
Yuki-onna is a powerful ice yokai with the ability to control frost and snow, and to float through the air. The Ice Witch Form has such power that it is said to freeze your heart with a single breath. 
The essence of Yuki-onna is imbued in this scroll.

name: Anji’s Talisman
description: A talisman given to you by Anji to help you pass Kuzuha's barrier. It shows the Tanuki Clan symbol, and contains powerful tanuki magic.

name: Sugar
description: Common seasoning. Enhances flavor when added during cooking.

name: Salt
description: Common seasoning. Enhances flavor when added during cooking.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Common metallurgical product. A raw material for making many basic items.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Common metallurgical product. Used to craft more advanced items.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Precious metallurgical resource. No one can resist the allure of gold...

name: Tofu
description: Made from soybeans. Ingredient for miso soup.

name: Miso
description: Made from soybeans. Ingredient for miso soup.

name: Flour
description: Made from wheat. Can be made into various pastries and noodles.

name: Matcha
description: Made from green tea. Cooking ingredient.

name: Rice
description: Obtained from rice paddies. Cooking ingredient.

name: Wooden Plank
description: Key material for furniture crafting.

name: Sakura Wine
description: A specialty wine from Seikyu. Crisp in fragrance and rich in taste, a favorite among connoisseurs.

name: Charcoal
description: Burns easily and efficiently, a must-have resource for explorers. Used for smelting metal and crafting.

name: Sulfur
description: Can be used to synthesize powerful explosives. Be careful when crafting with it!

name: Pink Dye
description: A dye extracted from rose petals. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing pink.

name: Scarlet Dye
description: A dye extracted from cinnabar. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing scarlet.

name: Gamboge Dye
description: A dye extracted from mangoes. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing gamboge.

name: Vermilion Dye
description: A dye extracted from realgar. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing vermilion.

name: Copper Rust Dye
description: A dye extracted from strawberries. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing into a copper rust color.

name: Ochre Dye
description: A dye extracted from ochre. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing ochre.

name: Malachite Green Dye
description: A dye extracted from azurite. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing peacock blue.

name: Peacock Green Dye
description: A dye extracted from malachite. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing malachite green.

name: Pale Blue Dye
description: A dye extracted from iris petals. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing pale blue.

name: Dark Blue Dye
description: A dye extracted from lapis lazuli. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing dark blue.

name: Light Purple Dye
description: A dye extracted from perilla. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing light purple.

name: Lilac Dye
description: A dye extracted from grapes. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing lilac.

name: Universal Dye
description: A dye extracted from white crystals. Can be used at the dyeing station to dye furniture and clothing any color.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: A deep-blue metamorphic rock, lapis lazuli has been used to make precious pigment since the dawn of civilization.

name: Realgar
description: Also known as ruby sulfur, realgar is an arsenic sulfide mineral. On long exposure to light, it disintegrates to a yellow powder. Used in the old days for brewing and staving off evil spirits.

name: Azurite
description: Azurite is a soft, deep-blue copper mineral. In antiquity it was ground into powder and used as a pigment. Recognized as a major source of blues used by painters.

name: Malachite
description: Malachite is an opaque, green-banded mineral. Used as a mineral pigment since ancient times. The mineral has also been used for decorative purposes.

name: Cinnabar
description: Generally found in a massive, granular, or earthy form, cinnabar is bright scarlet to brick-red in color. It has been used as a pigment, but releases toxin when burned.

name: Ochre
description: Also known as iron ochre, it appears in flat, irregular blocks and is reddish-brown in color. In the East, it was used as medicine as well as a pigment.

name: White Crystal
description: Clear and pristine, white crystal is known as God's Gift. Legend says that it can refract every color of the rainbow, making it the perfect ingredient for universal dye.

name: Tales of Glory
description: The complete collection of the original teachings by Goddess Inari, this book, bound by Priest Leon, is an invaluable collector’s item. The ultimate piece of Fox Clan heritage.

name: Hana
description:
The child of Nini, the Man-Eating Plant.
Abducted and sold to the casino by an unknown tanuki.

name: Scrap of Paper · I
description: An old scrap of paper left by your parents. With only a word, "Seikyu," you decided to journey to the island with the same name, to uncover the truth.

name: Scrap of Paper · II
description: Another scrap of paper, it mentions sending you and Kon away. The words are barely legible due to fading.

name: Scrap of Paper · III
description: A note fragment indicates unavoidable troubles, still discernible despite blurred writing.

name: Pieced-Together Note
description: A note from your parents to you and Kon was fragmented and scattered, but fortunately restored. You're eager to find out what it says.

name: Fox Seal
description: The official seal that represents the Fox Clan. It is an invaluable heirloom, locked away in the ruins.

name: Tabletop Game Figurine (Copper)
description: A character wearing a suit, from a fantasy human-themed board game, made from copper.

name: Tabletop Game Figurine (Iron)
description: A character wearing a suit, from a fantasy human-themed board game, made from iron.

name: Tabletop Game Figurine (Gold)
description: A character wearing a suit, from a fantasy human-themed board game, made from gold.

name: Special Fishing Rod
description: An intricately hand-made fishing rod, clearly made for a special someone.

name: Bonfire Delight!
description: Remember the Bonfire Party where we met everyone in Seikyu? It was such a wonderful and warm welcome!

name: Kon’s Party!
description: Kon had so much fun that day! I’m sure she’ll always remember her fishing trip with Seabert. She really deserves her human form - she’s always so cheerful!

name: Hot Spring Opening!
description: How did Seikyu NOT have a hot spring before?! It’s the perfect place for all yokai to relax after a long day of work. Thank you, Mika!

name: Kon and Seabert Fishing!
description: Seabert was the best fishing teacher for Kon, and I thought I saw something more finally blossoming between them that day… but Kon won’t talk about it.

name: The Superheroes and their Statues!
description: We never expected that all of Seikyu would honor us like this. After all, we came here to make our new home. Still can’t believe that the statues on the infamous Seikyu fountain are of us!

name: Straw Rope
description: A sturdy and reliable rope woven from cattail. It’s a vital component for many types of furniture, and a useful tool for farming life.

name: Silk
description: Impossibly smooth, this silk flows over your skin like water. Spun from the Silkworm Ice Cocoon, there’s no other fabric quite like it. The finest clothes are made from this silk.

name: Lotus Fiber
description: A heavenly scent still lingers in this special yarn. Spun from the Cloud Lotus, this fiber is very strong, and is used for clothes and furniture.

name: Cat Moss Fleece
description: Springy and soft, Cat Spirit Moss imbues this fleece with a warmth that goes beyond the material. Important for any serious crafter of furniture and clothes.

name: Wool Felt
description: Humble yet warm, this felt made from goat wool is ideal for basic clothes and furnishings.

name: Hidden Note
description: A hand-scrawled note found tucked away just outside the farmhouse.

name: A Perfect Egg
description: This is a carefully selected egg, perfect in every way.

name: Turnip
description:
Spring crop.
Adorable in shape and unique in taste. It's said to make one rich overnight, hence its fame.

name: Potato
description:
Spring crop.
Everybody loves potatoes! A humble tuber with the potential to be the staple of the world!

name: Old Record Book
description: This old record book was found by Kuzuha in the Sacred Halls. He has given this to you as part of his apology and to make amends for his past actions.

name: Celery
description:
Spring crop.
A sword-like vegetable, the adventurer's ally! Rich in fiber, celery helps you stay active in tough battles.

name: Garlic
description:
Spring crop.
Zesty and powerful with ancient evil-repelling properties. Without it, dishes would lose their charm.

name: Cabbage
description:
Spring and autumn crop.
This round vegetable is a farmer's favorite. Farmers in some regions hold cabbage harvesting ceremonies.

name: Red Bean
description:
Spring crop.
Red as ruby, they have been a symbol of love and longing. Its rich texture and sweet taste reminds one of love.

name: Rose
description:
Spring crop.   
No one can resist the temptation of a bouquet of roses... Or maybe it was just you? We'll never know.

name: Chinese Toon
description:
Spring crop.
Revolutionize your dining with this vegetarian delight! Its unique aroma and flavor are unforgettable.

name: Strawberry
description:
Spring crop.
Tangy and sweet, they conjure up beautiful memories. Their presence in desserts always ups the decadence.

name: Green Tea
description:
Summer crop.
It's popular in Seikyu, with a rich history of cultivation. Not only a refreshing taste, but also energizes the spirit.

name: Soybean
description:
Spring and autumn crop.
In some regions, it's said scattering beans wards off evil... Packed with plant protein, essential for many soya products.

name: Wheat
description:
Spring and summer crop.
A golden grain for baking bread and brewing intoxicating liquor. A bountiful wheat harvest indicates a civilization's prosperity.

name: Sugarcane
description:
Summer and autumn crop.
Sweet and juicy, often sliced and consumed raw. An important cash crop, they are used to make sugar and syrup.

name: Daylily
description:
Summer crop.
A.K.A. "Golden Flower Vegetable," it's believed to be soothing. As food, it's widely liked for its refreshing taste.

name: Pineapple
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by its tough outer rinds and golden yellow flesh. Tangy and sweet, it's popular as a snack and a cooking ingredient.

name: Hydrangea
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by big, round flower clusters. Symbolizes reunion, happiness, and hope.

name: Peach
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by its pink outer rind and juicy, fragrant flesh. That's right, nobody can say no to peaches.

name: Lemon
description:
Summer crop.
Known for its bright yellow peel and uplifting fragrance. Its intense acidic taste can make any dish stand out.

name: Watermelon
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by its red flesh which is sweet and refreshing. At the height of summer, a slice of watermelon is pure joy.

name: Tomato
description:
Summer crop.
Has a smooth peel, soft flesh, and is loaded with antioxidants. Widely used in salads, soups, sauces, and other dishes.

name: Raspberry
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by its small, oblong fruit with a fine texture. Slightly sour with rich fruit aroma, they are loved by many.

name: Cucumber
description:
Spring, summer, and autumn crop.
A crunchy vegetable characterized by its cylindrical shape. A symbol of highest beauty in the eyes of a kappa.

name: Mango
description:
Summer crop.
Characterized by its smooth texture and slightly sour taste. A great ingredient for juices, ice cream, and desserts.

name: Grape
description:
Summer crop.
Fleshy, round berries that grow in clusters, juicy and tart. Can be eaten raw or made into wine, juice, and dried fruit.

name: Yam
description:
Autumn crop.
A nutrition-packed root vegetable with rough skin. A source of various nutrients, it has stomach-nourishing effects.

name: Dandelion
description:
Summer crop.
Known for its parachute-like seeds that spread with the wind. The root and the leaves are believed to have medicinal value.

name: Perilla
description:
Autumn crop.
An herbaceous plant named for its purple leaves. Its distinct fragrance has made it a popular cooking ingredient.

name: Onion
description:
Autumn crop.
Characterized by its multi-layered structure and its sharp taste. If sadness can't make you cry, an onion will.

name: Chili Pepper
description:
Autumn crop.
A commonly used spice whose hot taste has made it stand out. Did you know? The spice is not a flavor, but a sensation...

name: Pumpkin
description:
Autumn crop.
A tough rind and meaty flesh, used for cooking and decoration. Its orange rind and lantern-like shape suggests a joyful harvest.

name: Sweet Potato
description:
Autumn crop.
A nutritious root vegetable with a starchy and sweet taste. Especially popular when it's cold.

name: Lily of the Valley
description:
Autumn crop.
Characterized by the white, bell-shaped, drooping flowers. Symbolizes purity, joy, and hope. Great gifting option.

name: Iris
description:
Autumn crop.
The flower resembles a bird's tail, hence the name. Graceful and fragrant, it symbolizes nobility and freedom.

name: Swiss Cheese Plant
description:
Autumn crop.
The leaves resemble a turtle's shell, hence the name. A common plant belonging to the Araceae family.

name: Spinach
description:
Autumn crop.
Nutritious leafy green vegetable, rich in vitamins and minerals. Said to make a certain sailor gain superhuman strength.

name: Carrot
description:
Autumn crop.
A common root vegetable, orange in color. Packed with nutrients, a key component of a healthy diet.

name: Taro
description:
Autumn and winter crop.
A starchy root vegetable with rough skin and pale purple corm. A nutritious ingredient, it can be steamed, roasted, or boiled.

name: Mayonnaise
description: A condiment made primarily from egg yolk. Almost every household has its own family recipe. To make original mayonnaise, you need a mayonnaise machine.

name: Cheese
description: Fermented dairy product. Loved for its rich aroma and tangy flavor. To make original cheese, you need a cheese press.

name: Mixed Pickled Vegetables
description: Made from seasonal veggies in a pickling barrel. Delicious, essential for meals. To make original pickles, you need a pickling barrel.

name: Dried Fish
description: Fresh fish preserved by drying. The method extends the shelf life of seafood to get through long winters.

name: Rice Plant
description:
Autumn crop.
Processed into rice, one of Seikyu's most important staple foods, good for both cooking and brewing.

name: Apple
description:
Summer crop.
Irresistibly crunchy, apples have become common in Seikyu. Why do apples fall down when they're ripe...

name: Cherry Blossom
description: Spring in Seikyu arrives fashionably late. Its unique flavor is highly sought after, making it an excellent ingredient for both brewing and baking.

name: Coffee Bean
description: A bag of roasted coffee beans that can be used with a coffee machine to brew a fresh cup of coffee.

name: Waterfall Bamboo
description:
All-seasons crop.
It loves growing in the splashes of waterfalls. These bamboo have wave-like patterns on their nodes.

name: Sky Leek
description:
All-seasons crop.
Wonderfully delicious, these special leeks have a blue tint on their leaves, the same color as the clear sky.

name: Flowering Wisteria
description: The wisteria blossoms emit a purple glow at night, bringing a sense of magic and wonder. And in the wind, its petals drop like the gentlest rain.

name: Silkworm Ice Cocoon
description: The beautiful blue cocoon looks like it has been crystallized in time with icy cool silk.

name: Cattail
description: They can be found swaying in shallow ponds with a distinctive sweet smell. The flowers can be dried to produce soft fluff and tough stem, useful for filling cushions and weaving mats.

name: Cloud Lotus
description: It is always surprising to learn that lotus silk is soft, smooth, and shiny, making it an excellent fabric for clothes. This makes the cloud lotus a favorite gift in Seikyu.

name: Mountain Asparagus
description:
All-seasons crop.
The young shoots are a delicacy - a taste like no other!

name: Mountain Blueberries
description:
All-seasons crop.
Wonderfully refreshing, the blueberries are not only sweet, but naturally chilled with a layer of frost.

name: Matsutake
description:
All-seasons crop.
If you search carefully under thatch and fallen autumn leaves, you may find this mushroom treat, famous for its distinct taste.

name: Red Spider Lily
description: This gorgeous red blossom looks like a small fire, with filaments of burning embers.

name: Jade Radish
description:
All-seasons crop.
Buried deep in the snow at the end of winter, this radish has flesh as translucent as jade.

name: Cat Spirit Moss
description: Found only in the homes of the wild Gulubo, this moss glows orange under catbeds and Gulubo nests, keeping both Gulubo and cats warm.

name: Magic Mistletoe
description: It grows in hidden spots around the Tree of the Mountain Goddess, appearing only to those who are pure in heart and passionately in love.

name: Cherry Wood
description: Wood obtained from cherry trees.

name: Oak Wood
description: Wood obtained from oak trees.

name: Oak Resin
description: Resin obtained when felling oak trees.

name: Kamishiro
description: Wood obtained from trees buried underground and in the ruins. This precious material makes exquisite items.

name: Fruit Cheese
description: This creamy, sweet cheese is the best of both worlds. Combine fresh, scrumptious fruit with cheese to create a delicious sensation. Ideal for special occasions.

name: Giant Turnip
description:
Spring crop.
Adorable in shape and unique in taste. It's said to make one rich overnight, hence its fame.

name: Giant Potato
description:
Spring crop.
Everybody loves potatoes! A humble tuber with the potential to be the staple of the world!

name: Giant Celery
description:
Spring crop.
A sword-like vegetable, the adventurer's ally! Rich in fiber, celery helps you stay active in tough battles.
