description:
Autumn crop.
Processed into rice, one of Seikyu's most important staple foods, good for both cooking and brewing.

name: Turnip Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest turnips. 
Low cost for a nice return. Even beginners enjoy farming this.

name: Potato Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest potatoes. 
Low cost for a good return.

name: Celery Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest celery. 
Sow the seeds and wait for them to grow... Adds a fresh green touch to your field.

name: Garlic Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest garlic. 
A common yet indispensable spice. Every chef grows some in their garden.

name: Cabbage Seeds
description:
Plant in spring/autumn to harvest cabbages. 
Although the wait is long... cultivating them always feels rewarding.

name: Red Bean Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest red beans. 
Fertile soil allows for a continuous harvest. The next batch is always just around the corner!

name: Rose Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest roses. 
Who doesn't love fragrant bouquets? Capture your lover's heart with roses!

name: Chinese Toon Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest Chinese toon. 
Requires good soil and sunlight. Wait patiently for it to grow.

name: Strawberry Seeds
description:
Plant in spring to harvest strawberries. 
Red strawberries, a gift no one can refuse.

name: Green Tea Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest green tea. 
Fine green tea, always a great gift.

name: Soybean Seeds
description: Plant in spring or autumn to harvest soybeans. These nutrient-packed beans make you crave soymilk.

name: Wheat Seeds
description:
Plant in spring/summer to harvest wheat. 
A truly golden crop. Gives your field a golden glow.

name: Sugarcane Seeds
description:
Plant in summer and autumn to harvest sugarcane.
Nobody can resist a cup of sweet sugarcane juice... One sip and you'll feel charged up.

name: Daylily Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest daylilies.
The wait may be long, but it's definitely worth it. It's said that daylilies can revive the dead.

name: Pineapple Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest pineapples.
This unique-looking fruit is imported from the outside world. When grown locally in Seikyu, it also has an invigorating effect.

name: Hydrangea Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest hydrangea flowers.
Harvest every day upon ripening. The big, round flower clusters make the perfect gift.

name: Peach Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest peaches.
"Peach!" Even the name is adorable...

name: Lemon Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest lemons.
The sour taste is reminiscent of one's first love...

name: Watermelon Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest watermelons.
Ice-cold watermelons are what makes summer unforgettable.

name: Tomato Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest tomatoes.
It fills you with joy watching them transition from green to red... Veritable rubies in the fields.

name: Raspberry Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest raspberries.
They're stunningly invigorating. Who doesn't love these cute little berries?

name: Cucumber Seeds
description:
Plant in spring, summer and autumn to harvest cucumbers.
For years the kappa have monopolized cucumber cultivation. Maybe they'll sell you some seeds if they see you as an ally?

name: Mango Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest mangoes.
You'll never forget the juicy, sour-sweet fruit.

name: Grape Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest grapes.
Besides juice, grapes can also be turned into dye.

name: Yam Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest yams.
These tubers may look humble, but they can help recover HP.

name: Dandelion Seeds
description:
Plant in summer to harvest dandelions.
Seeds spread by the wind, growing wherever they land. An ideal gift for one's sweetheart.

name: Perilla Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest perilla.
Versatile and fragrant, a must-have ingredient for your kitchen. Feel free to sell it to those in need if you have extra.

name: Onion Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest onions.
The ultimate tear-jerkers in the kitchen. Think you're tough? They will make you bawl your eyes out.

name: Chili Pepper Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest chili peppers.
Show your enemy the meaning of spiciness.

name: Pumpkin Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest pumpkins.
The long wait makes them ideal for patient farmers. Eating food made with pumpkins makes you stronger.

name: Sweet Potato Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest sweet potatoes.
These filling vegetables will help you face pain and injuries.

name: Lily of the Valley Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest lilies of the valley.
A great gift for all your adorable friends.

name: Iris Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest irises.
The ultimate friendship booster.

name: Swiss Cheese Plant Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest Swiss cheese plants.
Recently imported to Seikyu, they are trending fast. A good gifting option.

name: Spinach Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest spinach.
Grants a certain sailor superhuman strength. Consumed by ordinary folks, it only recovers HP.

name: Carrot Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest carrots.
They have become hugely popular for their nutritional value.

name: Taro Seeds
description:
Plant in autumn, winter to harvest taro.
When consumed, it greatly recovers your HP. Delicious and helps you bring your A-game.

name: Rice Seed
description:
Plant in autumn to harvest rice.
It restores energy after consumption, which makes it popular among manual laborers.

name: Barely Edible Dish
description: The name says it all - this dish is barely edible. Very few people can stomach it.

name: Miso Soup
description: A traditional Eastern dish made with a fermented miso base, fresh vegetables and smooth tofu. A simple and traditional soup, it's a staple of the local diet.

name: Red Bean Soup
description: A warm and sweet traditional dish made with red beans and syrup. Its warm, rich texture and sweet taste are loved by children.

name: Strawberry Cake
description: A heart-fluttering romantic dessert made with soft sponge cake, creamy icing, and fresh strawberries. A sincere expression of love for you and your beloved.

name: Grilled Vegetables
description: A simple dish made by grilling any two vegetables, capturing their freshness and nutrients. A popular choice for adventurers.

name: Roasted Tubers
description: An easy, yet hearty and warming meal formed by roasting any two root vegetables. Sweet and savory, they grant energy for adventures.

name: Fruit Medley
description: A colorful and tasty medley completed with any two fruits. Enjoy the sweet and juicy flavor; don't miss out!

name: Root Vegetable Puree
description: A velvety and fragrant dish with any root vegetable and garlic; boiled, mashed and pureed. An Instant energy boost.

name: Potato Stew
description: A classic, tasty stew with potatoes and succulent meat, simmered in broth and spices. The perfect test of a chef's skills.

name: Scrambled Eggs
description: A simple yet flavorful dish with tender Chinese toon leaves and eggs. A perfect blend that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Matcha Cake
description: An exquisite Japanese dessert made with fine flour and fragrant matcha powder, carefully blended and baked. The intense aroma and bitter-sweet taste is truly unforgettable.

name: Strong Tea
description: A captivating beverage made with premium tea leaves and spring water. Rich, refreshing and relaxing for mind and body.

name: Refined Miso Soup
description: A luxurious Eastern soup combining fermented miso, fish, and tofu, with crispy turnip for the finishing touch.

name: Okonomiyaki
description: A traditional Kansai dish grilled with eggs, flour, and cabbage. Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside. Wins foodies' hearts.

name: Cabbage Rolls
description: An easy-to-make dish with fresh cabbage wrapped around a select filling. Crunchy, delicious, rich flavor with every bite.

name: Fried Pork Cutlet
description: A classic dish consisting of a breaded, deep-fried cutlet. Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, it goes with any sauce or salad.

name: Vegetable Tempura
description: An exquisite dish consisting of fried veggies in a thin batter. Yes, it's fried, but it's also vegetarian. No harm, no foul!

name: Grilled Fish
description: A common grilled dish made with any fish. Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, good for a satisfying meal on a budget.

name: Char-Grilled Kebabs
description: A common grilled dish made with any meat. Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, good for a satisfying meal on a budget.

name: "Ninja Bubble" (Lemon)
description: Lemon-flavored Ninja Bubble. The most popular soda today, loved by kids worldwide.

name: "Ninja Bubble" (Strawberry)
description: Strawberry-flavored Ninja Bubble. The most popular soda today, loved by kids worldwide.

name: "Ninja Bubble" (Pineapple)
description: Pineapple-flavored Ninja Bubble. The most popular soda today, loved by kids worldwide.

name: "Ninja Bubble" (Melon)
description: Melon-flavored Ninja Bubble. The most popular soda today, loved by kids worldwide.

name: Shrimp Onigiri
description: A delicious Japanese snack. Consists of a rice ball wrapped in nori that is filled with deep-fried shrimp tempura. Superb flavor with each bite.

name: Shawarma
description: A Middle Eastern dish with a unique taste. Consists of thin slices of meat roasted and wrapped in a soft flatbread with veggies and sauces. Tasty and convenient.

name: Confit Lamb Stew
description: A classic French dish made with premium meat, slow-simmered with various spices for the mouthwatering taste. An absolute must-have for holiday banquets.

name: Raclette Cheese
description: A classic Swiss dish, based on heating cheese and scraping off the melted parts, served with boiled potatoes and ham. A heart-melting dish that brings to mind the warmth of home.

name: Chicken Dumpling Soup
description: A traditional dish featuring dumplings in fragrant soup. Warm and filling, it brings you pure joy in cold seasons.

name: Multi-Flavored Scone
description: A traditional British pastry, golden and crispy on the outside, soft and dense on the inside, eaten with jam, cream, or honey. A scone and a cuppa, now that's teatime done right.

name: Potato Pancake
description: A simple yet delicious dish, made by shallow-frying pancakes of grated potato and flour, seasoned with condiments. It's crunchy, it's yummy, it's perfectly potatoey .

name: Rice Burger
description: An ingenious Asian take on the traditional burger, featuring compressed rice patties that replace conventional burger buns. Enjoy the multi-layered taste with rice and juicy fillings.

name: Tapioca Pudding
description: A sweet, smooth-textured pudding made from root vegetables instead of tapioca powder. Creamy and velvety, it melts into an aromatic treat while eating. Add milk or coconut milk to make it extra tantalizing.

name: Tella-Obachan's Fried Bread
description: A traditional snack brimming with nostalgia. Crispy and soft at the same time, reminiscent of one's youth. Grab a bite when you're hungry.

name: Nimu Chicken
description: A tasty dish made with tender meat, meticulously-seasoned and cooked. Wonderfully multi-layered texture and rich fragrance.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
description: A classic beverage with a refreshing taste. Made by blending fresh strawberries with milk and sugar. Cool and creamy, a perfect summer drink.

name: Poutine
description: A mouthwatering snack consisting of french fries and cheese curds, topped with a brown gravy. An excellent companion for parties and gatherings.

name: Inarizushi
description: A traditional Japanese dish, consisting of fried tofu filled with sushi rice, achieving a perfectly balanced taste. A classic bento item, and a suitable offering for Inari.

name: Elva's Beef Curry with Rice
description: An exclusive recipe made with premium meat and an assortment of spices, slow-stewed for its tender, velvety texture. Served with a curry made with onions and carrots.

name: Red-Braised Chicken with Rice
description: A classic homemade dish consisting of juicy, red-braised meat served with rice drenched in a fragrant sauce. It may be homely, but it can shine at a banquet as well.

name: Lun's Beef Stew
description: Using a secret family recipe, it's made of premium meat, slow-simmered to achieve a tender and velvety texture. A dish encapsulating the family's love and unique cooking style.

name: Omurice
description: Omurice is a Japanese-style vegetarian dish. Fried rice wrapped in a fluffy omelet, topped with ketchup. Omurice has long been a top choice for fast food.

name: Extra-Cold Ice Cream
description: Want some cool and sweet snowball ice cream? A rare dessert made by the fabled Yuki-onna. It's said Yuki-onna's powers keep the ice cream from melting.

name: Imoni
description: A hot dish originating from the cold northern regions. Meat stewed in a broth of miso and starchy root vegetables. Some regions cook imoni on riverbanks to celebrate the harvest.

name: Yaki Onigiri Chazuke
description: A traditional Japanese-style dish. Crispy rice balls soaked in a tea broth that emit a unique aroma. The combination of rice and tea offers an unparalleled treat.

name: Candy Apple
description: A red apple coated in candy, a snack with nostalgia at its core. A sweet crunch juxtaposed with sour juiciness. A treat beloved by adults and children alike.

name: Sakura Cookie
description: A tasty springtime treat that is as beautiful as it is delicious. It effortlessly blends sweetness with floral fragrance, and offers a joyful experience as fleeting as a cherry blossom.

name: Sakura Milk Pudding
description: A dessert that brings added surprise to a beautiful spring day. Infused with sakura aroma, bringing a hint of sweetness. Its taste is reminiscent of a springtime dream...

name: Milla's Choice
description: A delicious dish introduced to Seikyu by the gourmet Milla. Steamed beans, sausage, and rice, absolutely mouthwatering! It's widely popular due to its ease of cooking.

name: Pot-Fried Pork
description: Introduced to Seikyu from a mysterious ancient eastern nation. Juicy slices of meat coated in starch, fried and served in sauce. The aroma alone is enough to make you salivate.

name: Beer
description: At some point, homebrewing became a Seikyu tradition. Now every household brews and shares their own beer. Drinking a cold beer in the sea air is a favorite pastime.

name: Sake
description: Brewed from spring water and rice, this sake is crisp, rich, and has a lingering finish. Whether served chilled or warm, it offers distinct flavors. The finest sake is always dedicated to Inari.

name: Takoyaki
description: A festival favorite and street food classic! Chewy octopus encased in a soft batter, topped with seaweed flakes and bonito shavings. Every bite combines savory and umami flavors - utterly irresistible.

name: Red Bean Mochi
description: Nothing beats a warm bowl of red bean mochi after a tiring day. The fragrant rice and red beans blend perfectly with the sweet bean soup, creating a delightful experience.

name: Soy Sauce Dango
description: Without dango, tea shops would struggle to stay in business. Paired with tea, it balances bitterness without overpowering it. Glazed with a sweet soy sauce, it’s a real treat for the soul.

name: Three-Color Dango
description: Dango is a tea shop essential, traditionally served to complement tea’s bitterness. These are colored with sakura petals and grass extracts, bringing a burst of vitality with every bite.

name: Coffee
description: A drink that Yohji cannot live without.

name: Coffee-Flavored Cake
description: Yohji's favorite!

name: Fruit Wine
description: Made from the finest Seikyu fruit, this wine is lightly sweet and refined. A perfect drink to share with friends on a summer evening.

name: Gulubo's Treasure
description: Pass the challenge of the Gulu Bobo to win treasures of wisdom and courage. Can be exchanged for Mementos.

name: Fried Tofu
description: Hidden in the ruins’ intricate puzzles and endorsed by the Goddess Inari, this delicacy is extremely rare.

name: Koban
description: A shiny and sleek coffee machine that brightens every morning. Despite obvious care, it has been well-used.

name: Carp Festival Bait
description: Decorative prop ticket for a contest, resembling bait. Used in hopes of good performance.

name: Boss Qian Duoduo and the Greedy Gold Treant
description: Collaboration figures from the Candy Disaster universe. Exclusive casino prize that holds immense collectible value. Fortune awaits - claim endless riches!

name: Ma Feifei
description: A motivational figure from the Candy Disaster universe, an exclusive casino prize. Mafifi leaves failure and despair behind, inspiring others to chase dreams without hesitation.

name: Tree Village Hero
description: A special casino reward from the Candy Disaster world. Even when the path is uncertain, this figure embodies the courage to challenge fate with all your might.

name: ACE Gargoyle
description: A Candy Disaster crossover figure and rare casino prize. The gargoyle stands as an impartial overseer of absolute fairness and justice. Don’t even think about sneaking around!

name: Fox Plushie
description: Soft and fluffy, this little fox plushie stares at you with its big blue eyes. It seems to ask, "Where shall we go and play today?"

name: Box Bakery
description: It seems this little guy opened a Box Bakery and should be living happily in a town full of animals. So why has he appeared here?

name: Shrimp and Crab Trap
description: Place in water to harvest shrimp, crabs, and other seafood after a period of time. The trap can only contain so many, so remember to collect often!

name: Fishing Trap
description: Place in water to harvest fish autonomously. There's a limit to the number of fish which can be held, so remember to collect them periodically!

name: Basic Explosive Barrel
description: Handle with care! This explosive barrel can destroy level 2 minerals and wood, and deals some damage to monsters.

name: Slime Box
description: A single-use slimy surprise for enemies. Throw to deliver a powerful blow!

name: Animal Trap
description: Place this in the wild to collect a certain amount of meat every other day. Choose your trap location carefully!

name: Damp Package
description: A package tossed to Mr Quack upon the princess's departure from Seikyu. Alas, the package never reached the shore. It's all wet, whatever is inside?

name: Basic Fertilizer
description: A simple nutrient-rich fertilizer to accelerate crop growth.

name: VHS Camcorder
description: Seabert's camcorder.

name: Organic Fertilizer
description: Fertilizer made from natural materials. Nutrient-rich, this is exactly what plants crave for faster growth.

name: Ice Orb
description: Freezes monsters within a certain range. The freezing effect lasts a short time, after which monsters will thaw. Use strategically!

name: Yield Boost Fertilizer
description: Fertilizer that increases crop yield by 125%. It can only be used on current harvests.

name: Giant Growth Fertilizer
description: When size matters, use this fertilizer to grow giant produce. Appearance and selling price will change, so use with care.

name: Lightning Growth Fertilizer
description: A highly concentrated fertilizer that supercharges growth. Crops mature instantly! Ideal when there is an urgent need for particular produce.

name: Hydrating Fertilizer
description: Special fertilizer that injects special hydrating properties into the soil. No additional watering is needed before the next harvest. Only effective for one harvest.

name: Intermediate Explosive Barrel
description: A more powerful single-use explosive barrel. Destroys level 3 minerals and wood with a moderate blast radius.

name: Advanced Explosive Barrel
description: An incredibly explosive barrel with a large blast radius. Destroys level 4 minerals and wood. It is highly recommended to use this from a safe distance.

name: User-Friendly Explosive Barrel
description: A specially modified explosive barrel with an extremely wide blast area. Very effective, it destroys minerals and wood of all levels without harming the user.

name: Doubled Yield Boost Fertilizer
description: An improved high-efficiency fertilizer that boosts yield by 200%. Affects only the current harvest.

name: Slime Cultivation Barrel
description: A specialized container for cultivating slime goo automatically. Set it and forget it for all your slime needs.

name: One Strike Victory
description: When outnumbered and out of options, this might just save the day. A single-use damage dealer that strikes down nearby monsters.

name: Maple Leaf Burial
description: Harness the untapped power of maple leaves by launching at monsters. The leaves will deal continuous damage until the charge is used up.

name: Giant Rock Breaker
description: Call on the destructive strength of rock with this single-use combat charge. Use on groups of monsters to deal massive damage.

name: Hellfire
description: Handle with caution! A dangerous item sealed with intense flames from the depths. Deals heavy and continuous damage to nearby monsters.

name: Seabert's Photo
description: A photo of you and Kon fishing at Pearl Lake. Kon is in fox form, sitting on your lap as you fish, both laughing.

name: Crafting Table
description: Used for crafting furniture. Skilled craftsmen prefer making their own.

name: Small Wooden Box
description: A furniture piece for storing items. Can hold up to 21 items. Add multiple boxes for more storage.

name: Yokai Cauldron
description: A special cauldron for all your monster loot needs! It creates random monster items and also duplicates monster items of your choice.

name: Stove
description: A furniture piece used for cooking. Becoming a chef requires only a Stove and a passion for cooking.

name: Scarecrow Yokai
description: The ideal farming companion! With proper feeding and upgrades, the scarecrow will diligently tend its assigned field, watering crops and sowing seeds.

name: Sake Brewer
description: For homebrewers looking to make their favorite sake, this is ideal. Rice is washed, pressed, and fermented all in one place. The result: delicious homemade sake!

name: Smelting Furnace
description: Equipment for smelting metals. Refines raw ores from the wild into purer metal ingots.

name: Tofu Press
description: Equipment for making tofu. Add beans and witness the magic.

name: Stone Mill
description: Equipment for making wheat flour. Add wheat and just wait for flour to emerge.

name: Kimono Stand
description: To maintain their shape and lines, kimonos must be stored using a special hanger. Showcases elegant pleats and patterns of the garment.

name: Well-Made Bedding
description: What can soft bedding do for you? Enhances comfort and creates a relaxed vibe. Who wouldn't want to laze in bed all day?

name: Oblong Floor Lamp
description: Antique floor lamp that shines wherever it's placed. Crafted from bamboo with a rustic paper shade, emits a soft, warm glow.

name: Wooden Storage Cabinet
description: Great for keeping the home shipshape. Comes with various sized drawers to suit your every need. The wood texture adds a splash of nature.

name: Gourd Lantern
description: Inspired by the traditional Japanese gourd, bringing a unique Eastern flair. Who can resist the charm of the pumpkin?

name: Wooden Sign
description: A wooden sign for marking locations or providing information.

name: Stone Lantern
description: A simple and elegant stone lantern. The perfect ornament for every garden.

name: Wooden Gate
description: A durable gate for security and privacy, serves as an entrance to buildings.

name: Lantern
description: Emits a soft light, used to illuminate pathways or rooms.

name: Wooden Fence
description: Decorative wooden fencing for marking territory or gardens, both aesthetic and functional.

name: Thatched Bed
description: A somewhat comfortable bedding, lined with straw padding. Quality sleep can help you quickly find your footing in a new environment.

name: Charcoal Kiln
description: A furnace for producing charcoal, converts wood into useful fuel.

name: Drying Rack
description: Equipment for drying food or items. Can be used to maintain freshness or process ingredients.

name: Square Ceiling Chandelier
description: A staple for every home. Simple and elegant, it integrates well with other furniture of different styles and designs - perfect for your lighting needs.

name: Pickling Barrel
description: A wooden container for preserving and pickling food, helps maintain freshness and flavor.

name: Exquisite Wooden Chest
description: Decorative and functional wooden storage, for organizing and storing items.

name: Mayonnaise Maker
description: A device for making delicious mayonnaise. Turns eggs into a rich sauce.

name: Cheese Press
description: Processes milk into cheese. Designed for storing and preserving cheese, and maintains flavor and texture.

name: Basic Sprinkler
description: An automatic irrigation device for watering plants and gardens. Protects crops from drying up.

name: Wooden Flooring
description: Simple, lightweight wooden flooring. Ideal for outdoor uses.

name: Outdoor Bonfire
description: A bonfire for outdoor use. Provides simple lighting and can also be used for temporary cooking.

name: Thatched Shelter
description: Great for sheltering from the rain, can store delicate tools.

name: Thatched Fishing Hut
description: Great for sheltering from the rain, can store delicate tools.

name: Koinobori Pole
description: A sturdy wooden pole for hanging colorful koinobori. During the spring Carp Festival, every household raises one in hope for children to grow up brave and healthy like the carp.

name: Storage Yokai
description: A living warehouse that occasionally gives a startling surprise. It has a gentle nature and likes to eat various ores. Well-maintained, it can store more items.

name: Dyeing Station
description: A simple, lightweight dyeing station, for dyeing clothing. A must-have item for those passionate about home aesthetics.

name: Beer Keg
description: A keg made with traditional craftsmanship. Great for brewing and storing, keeps beer fresh and adds a hint of oak.

name: Dye Bath
description: Use it to extract dyes from fruit and flowers. Your gateway to unlimited dyes.

name: Spray Station
description: A simple and light spray station, designed for spray painting furniture. A must-have for those passionate about home aesthetics.

name: Stone Mortar
description: Use it to extract dyes from minerals. Your gateway to unlimited dyes.

name: Toaster Oven
description: A trending model popular among chefs and homemakers. Features a well-designed structure for efficient baking. Suitable for beginners and advanced bakers alike.

name: Fish Pond
description: Fish need their pond just like Seikyu needs you... Place the fish you caught in it to keep them healthy. Also a good way to watch your aquatic friends.

name: Spinning Wheel
description: A magical machine that turns plant materials into thread. Tired of buying clothes off the rack? Make your own!

name: Loom
description: An incredible machine that turns threads into cloth. Say goodbye to your old, tattered clothes... Don't feel like buying clothes? Make your own!

name: Seed Separator
description: This machine quickly separates seeds from mature crops, making the seeds of your crop choice. Easy to use and ideal for daily farm work.

name: Compost Bin
description: An important part of eco-conscious living, this compost bin is ideal for making homegrown fertilizer. Help leftover fruit and vegetables grow new ones.

name: Ore Replication Machine
description: Create your own ores at home! Place in an ore of your choice and the machine will produce another one.

name: Crystal Replication Machine
description: Cultivate crystals at home using this special machine. Insert one crystal to produce an identical one.

name: Chip Production Machine
description: Automatically produce chips at home with this dedicated machine. The chips can be used in the casino.

name: Bug Bait Box
description: Keen anglers love this machine! Automatically create 5 common fish bait a day. Storage is limited, so remember to collect them in time!

name: Thatch Spirit
description: Collecting thatch has never been easier. This spirit will collect and organize thatch for you! It works tirelessly every day, so make sure to stop and collect the thatch regularly.

name: Flower Duplication Box
description: Need a bouquet of just one flower type? This box will duplicate any flower put into it. Simply insert the flower you want to copy, and you'll get it and its duplicate back.

name: Animal Biscuit Oven
description: Keep your animals happy with their favorite treats! This oven will automatically produce animal biscuits every day. Remember to collect the treats regularly!

name: Treasure Detector
description: Treasure hunters take note! This detector marks treasure chest locations within a 100-meter range on the map. Works underground in the ruins as well as above ground.

name: Ruins Teleport Point
description: Place this anywhere in the ruins to create a permanent teleportation point.

name: Overground Teleport Point
description: Need to move around quicker? Place this at certain locations above ground to create a permanent teleport point.

name: Mushroom Stump
description: Perfect for those who love mushrooms! This stump will produce 3 random mushrooms or yokai shrooms each day. Storage is limited, so collect them in time!

name: Exquisite Bed
description: An antique bed acquired from a furniture store. Exquisitely crafted, a testament to unparalleled handiwork. Carries the wisdom of ages, silently recounting old tales.

name: Bathtub
description: An antique bathtub acquired from a furniture store. Said to be a perfect replica of the tub owned by a queen. Today, ordinary people can also live it up like royalty.

name: L-Shaped Folding Screen
description: Screen painted with delicate strokes, each panel telling a vivid story. Perfect for creating a private space.

name: Wooden Wardrobe
description: Made of age-old wood, sturdy with a pleasant woody scent. Blends in seamlessly with any room.

name: Wooden Mirror
description: Features a bright surface, set in an elegant wooden frame, providing a clearer reflection.

name: Paper Lantern
description: Soft light shining through paper creates a cozy, peaceful ambience, as if surrounded by fireflies in the forest at night.

name: Kimono Stand (New)
description: A terrific tool to display the beauty of a kimono, with each detail paying homage to the grand tradition. No wrinkles should appear on such a luxurious garment.

name: Wooden Storage Unit
description: Large capacity, carefully crafted with traditional handiwork. An elegant home for all your items.

name: Drawing Board
description: Tailored for artists and designers, sturdy and practical. The perfect place for creativity to thrive.

name: Japanese Bedding
description: Low and comfortable, featuring a simple design imbued with Eastern philosophy. Ensures a restful night's sleep and solace for body and mind.

name: Large Clay Jar
description: A superb work of top-notch traditional handiwork. Its patterns have worn slightly with the passage of time, but they imbue it with a rich sense of history and culture.

name: Old Bedside Table
description: An old piece acquired from a flea market. Though the craftsmanship is ordinary, it's in good condition, adding a touch of nostalgia to the bedroom.

name: Harvest Dining Table
description: Featuring bright fruit and vegetable patterns, a reminder of nature's generous gifts, the table adds joy to every meal.

name: Exquisite Bedside Table
description: The designer's ingenuity shines through every single detail. Combining aesthetics with practicality, it definitely makes your bedroom feel more luxurious.

name: Exquisite L-Shaped Cabinet
description: The L-shaped design maximizes storage space, combining sleek design with practicality. A chic and convenient storage solution.

name: Round Floor Table
description: The circular design symbolizes harmony. The low height satisfies the needs of the tea ceremony. An indispensable piece of furniture for Seikyu's residents.

name: Simple Wooden Table

name: Floor Tea Table

name: Designer Wooden Stool

name: Old Sofa

name: Leather Armchair

name: Wooden Cotton Stool

name: Round Wooden Stool
description: Features a round wooden surface, sturdy and durable. The simple design fits various home settings.

name: Green Cotton Cushion

name: Square Floor Chair
description: Features a simple and practical square design, and can be used as temporary seating or small decoration. Flexible for any room layout.

name: Red Cotton Cushion

name: Blue Cotton Cushion
description: Crafted with blue fabric for a refreshing feel, featuring a simple and stylish round design. A perfect choice for leisure time.

name: Floor Cloud Chair
description: A Seikyu classic, this Japanese-style floor chair is made with warm and solid wood, and topped with a thick and soft cushion. You will feel like you are sitting on a cloud.

name: Bedside Table Lamp
description: Featuring a simple yet elegant design, its soft light adds to the coziness of the bedroom. Essential for every bedroom.

name: Old-Fashioned TV

name: Yuni's Antlers

name: Small Picture Frame

name: Toy Ornament

name: Copper Incense Burner
description: A copper incense burner steeped in classic beauty, adding a touch of zen to your home. Perhaps a bit too exquisite for what it is.

name: Electric Fan
description: Vintage meets modern. Practicality aside, this fan is also a great decorative piece, bringing a cool breeze to your room.

name: Maneki-neko
description: A traditional figurine symbolizing good fortune and wealth. Usually placed on store counters, beckoning for good business.

name: Scrubbing Basin
description: A practical cleaning tool whose simple design fits perfectly with daily life. A gentle reminder that even small details count.

name: Ceramic Vase
description: An elegant vase made of ceramics. A perfect home for fresh or dried flowers, adding a touch of natural beauty to indoor spaces.

name: Tabletop Candle
description: Though its lighting may be insufficient, it's more than enough for cozy dinners and special occasions. Perfect for creating a romantic ambience.

name: Ceramic Tea Set
description: Made of ceramics with fine handiwork, it perfectly captures the essence of Eastern tea culture. A welcome addition to anyone's collection.

name: White Ceramic Tea Set
description: Made of white ceramics, it's considered a premium tea set, adding a touch of serenity to the tea ceremony. A testament to its owner's distinguished status and taste.

name: Potted Plant
description: Features a simple design, with green plants that bring vitality indoors. Can be placed in any corner as a hint of nature.

name: Burlap Sack
description: A minimalist storage option, suitable for miscellaneous items or clothing. Looks a tad worse for wear though...

name: Engineer's Table Lamp
description: The favored lamp of engineers, it's perfect for work or study. A source of bright and even lighting.

name: Test Fish Tank
description: Provides fish fans with a glimpse into the aquatic life. Use extra caution when you move it... Tragedy will strike if it's broken.

name: Seikyu Floral Arrangement [Limited]
description: Seikyu flower arrangement is a practice that has been passed down from ancient times. Here, you can find carefully selected branches, precisely placed in an elegant posture, extending the vase.

name: Coffee Machine
description: A shiny and sleek coffee machine that brightens every morning. Despite obvious care, it has been well-used.

name: Yohji’s Coffee Setup
description: Yohji has had this coffee maker for nearly as long as you’ve known him - the perfect coffee grinder and filter setup for the true connoisseur who knows how to savor coffee.

name: Torii
description: Welcome gods and spirits to your farmhouse with this beautiful gate. A delectable decorative piece, it is also magical and enchanting.

name: Curved Wall Lamp
description: Boasting a unique design with two curves, it creates an artistic ambience in your house. A must-have for any discerning artist.

name: Western Pendulum Clock
description: An old piece procured at a flea market. In spite of its age, it's still accurate as ever. Hung on the wall, it can add a touch of elegance to the home.

name: Yokai Wall Ornament
description: A mysterious ornament steeped in Eastern mythology, it has a fantastic flair and adds an exotic touch to the home.

name: Japanese-Style Fan
description: Featuring a traditional Japanese motif, its delicate patterns are an apt representation of Eastern aesthetics. This is more than a fan; this is a piece of art.

name: Wooden Shelf
description: Made of solid wood, it is simple and sturdy, suitable for decorative or practical items. It's not much to look at, but it sure is convenient.

name: Wall Mirror
description: Features a bright surface, set in an elegant wooden frame, providing a clearer reflection.

name: Chinese Landscape Painting
description: A masterpiece by a renowned artist at first glance, it's actually a well-made replica upon closer inspection.

name: Calligraphy Plaque
description: A plaque acquired from a flea market. The inscription reads, "Receive beauty and kindness." An old store sign, it'll probably end up as firewood.

name: Mountain & Sea Painting
description: A painting acquired from a flea market. Depicts scenes from ancient legends. Not highly valuable, but perfect for a flair of literary grace.

name: Tool Pegboard
description: Designed with practicality in mind, the shelf is an organizable tool storage, giving your work area a sense of order.

name: Wooden Wall Cabinet
description: Made of sturdy wood, convenient storage for small items, perfect for kitchen or workshop use.

name: Peony with Morning Dew
description: A peony bathed in dew catches the eye of a young female painter. "Please, let me draw this flower!" Her eyes are full of passion. Soon, this enchanting yet humble peony is reborn as a painting.

name: Tears of the Moon
description: A blooming cereus catches the eye of a young female painter. Together, you and the maiden tend to it, and admire its beauty. The flower wilts at sunrise, but she has caught its splendor.

name: Amaterasu's Radiance
description: A peacock cactus flower attracts a young female painter. Its characteristics are opposed to those of the blooming cereus. The flower wilts at sunset, but luckily she eternalized its blossom.

name: Queen of Flowers
description: A gorgeous peony creates painter's block for the young girl. She hesitates, worried she can't capture the flower's beauty. She decides to break through and put her emotions into her work.

name: Daybreak Bloom
description: No matter how painful the past, people still forge ahead at dawn. Inspired by dawn, the girl decides to paint in her own style. "A different blossom," she said, looking beyond the horizon.

name: Golden Fans Wall Decoration
description: Exquisitely carved golden fans made with the finest materials. Bring the beauty of Seikyu into your home with the fragrance of wood and blossoms, and the playful shadows of clouds.

name: Wooden Wine Cabinet
description: This wooden wine rack is sturdy yet elegant. The practical design features sake on top, wine in the middle, and a cupboard for cups below. Perfect for a bar or as decoration in any room.

name: Goza Target
description: Composed of bamboo sticks, this target is used to hone sword skills. When struck, the bamboo resonates with crisp echoes. Helps fighters train for remarkable agility and sharpened perception.

name: Calligraphy Art
description: Aged wood frames a canvas with bold brushstrokes. The characters “Friendship Through Alcohol” reflect the carefree spirit, welcoming all into the space.

name: Katana Rack
description: A wooden rack holds three katana, their sheaths radiating quiet strength. Time-polished wood grain complements subtle danger in the hilts. It symbolises honor and protection wherever it stands.

name: Drum-Style Armor
description: Sturdy armor crafted from layers of metal and wood shaped like a war drum. Its lacquered surface bears traces of countless battles. Once worn by a seasoned warrior, it radiates solemn might.

name: Mountain Landscape Painting
description: A serene painting of distant hills, rendered in delicate strokes. Soft hues layer to form shifting mountain shadows and winds. It brings the quiet calm of a forgotten valley to the heart.

name: Bamboo Branch Vase
description: A bamboo vase helps plants grow naturally and gracefully. Tender buds and fresh leaves lend a quiet vitality. Placed upon a desk, it seems to bring a whisper of the forest indoors.

name: Kitchen Counter
description: An L-shaped counter crafted from dark wood, with a metal sink and storage cabinets bring order to the cooking space. Solid and practical, it carries the rhythm and warmth of everyday life.

name: Vintage Wooden Cabinet
description: A cabinet crafted with dark solid wood and gleaming brass handles. Multiple drawers and a central compartment bring both elegance and practicality. It adds a quiet, warm presence in the corner.

name: Pink Pattern Bed
description: A dark wooden frame with pink-patterned bedding, gentle yet refined. The soft fabric shimmers faintly under the light, promising peaceful sleep. It invites you into a warm and tender dream.

name: Standing Wooden Cabinet
description: A tall cabinet crafted from dark solid wood, steady and refined. Metal handles accent its minimalist design with gentle sheen. Functional and graceful, it adds a dependable presence to any room.

name: Retro Refrigerator
description: A rounded design and deep green exterior give pure nostalgic charm. Golden handles add warmth and metallic elegance. A quiet and distinctive addition to the kitchen or living room.

name: Household Oven
description: The oven’s rounded, dark green exterior exudes calm and reliability. Knobs and a glass door make cooking intuitive. Let the scent of baking spread quiet warmth through the home.

name: Double Gas Stove
description: The sleek metal surface and twin-burner design cooks efficiently. When the flames ignite, the dark rings glimmer with a gentle sheen. It stands quietly at the heart of the kitchen.

name: Warm Glow Chandelier
description: Amber shades diffuse soft radiance through the room. Its smooth metal frame carries a quiet sense of modern refinement. Beneath its glow, time seems to slow and breathe.

name: Ladle Rack
description: A sleek metal bar holds several ladles in neat alignment. When they sway, a soft clinking sound brings quiet life to the kitchen. Unassuming yet essential, it keeps cooking calm and orderly.

name: Baking Basket
description: A woven basket neatly holds a rolling pin and whisk, essential for baking. The soft fabric lining gives a gentle touch of home. It captures the sweetness and unhurried smiles of a kitchen memory.

name: Fruit Cake
description: Smooth cream drips down the sides, glistening in the light. Fresh berries, kiwi, and banana rest on top, fragrant and sweet. More than a dessert, it’s a slice of happiness on a plate.

name: Berry Cream Cake
description: Fluffy cream and fresh berries weave together in tempting harmony beneath the glass cover. Delicate chocolate flows across the surface. A refined celebration, waiting for its moment.

name: Assorted Cupcakes
description: Neat rows of small cakes rest on the tray, each unique yet harmonious. Light frosting and fruit glaze adorn their tops, perfect for an afternoon gathering full of sweetness and laughter.

name: Sunflower Arrangement
description: A golden sunflower pairs with pale blossoms, brightening the space. The bamboo-textured vase adds a touch of natural charm. It evokes a sunlit garden with a soft afternoon breeze.

name: Wooden-Frame Lantern
description: A classic wooden frame encases a soft amber shade. Its light is calm and warm, never harsh to the eyes. A reassuring and gentle presence in the darkness.

name: Step Cabinet
description: Storage designed like a staircase, with dark wood grain suggesting quiet dignity, while drawers and shelves add function and creativity. A special piece that brings structure and flow to the room.

name: Metal Safe
description: A solid metal body and reinforced lock convey trust and security. Its unyielding surface gives a muted sheen. It stands watch in silence, guarding secrets and treasures alike.

name: Glazed Flower Plate
description: Shades of blue swirl across petal-shaped ceramic. An uneven rim lends a touch of organic spontaneity. Like ripples in lake water, it conveys serenity and gentle motion.

name: Integrated Kitchen Counter
description: Compact and orderly, the sink and stove share a single surface. The dark wooden body provides stability while metallic accents add a modern touch. Cooking and storage flow together in harmony.

name: Tomato Basket
description: A round bamboo basket cradles ripe tomatoes, their skins gleaming. The woven texture contrasts beautifully against the vibrant red fruit. It carries the scent of a garden at dawn.

name: Lounge Chair Set
description: A soft chair with matching footrest creates a private moment of relaxation. The deep blue cushions are understated yet inviting. The moment you sit down, your fatigue simply melts away.

name: Standing Lantern
description: The lamp rises tall with a gentle amber glow. Standing quietly in its corner, it feels like a steady beacon of warmth that never fades.

name: Sleek Minimalist Sofa
description: Wooden armrests combine with cushions and a throw in a modern yet comfortable design. Clean, minimalist lines bring a sleek note to any home. Your body can unwind in style.

name: Fish Display
description: A real catch, this fish is preserved on a wooden plaque. The natural shimmer of its scales is carefully kept. It seems to whisper of unchanging rivers and tides.

name: Paper Globe Lamp
description: The spherical shade casts a gentle glow through the room. Layered rings add depth to the light, blending simplicity with warmth. It hangs in the air like a distant sun in the sky.

name: Monstera Potted Plant
description: Layered leaves unfold in rhythmic balance. The simple pot highlights the plant’s vitality and freshness. Its quiet presence breathes life and harmony into any space.

name: Drawing Workbench
description: Unfinished sketches and a ruler rest upon the surface. Each mark feels like the beginning of a new creation. Here, imagination takes shape, and inspiration is caught mid-breath.

name: Portable Game Console
description: Within its clean, compact form exists an entire world of play. A soft chime greets you as the power blinks on. In an instant, nothing exists but pixels on the screen and the joy they bring.

name: Bean Bag Chair
description: A soft filling molds effortlessly to every posture. Its rounded shape invites you to sink in without a second thought. Even your thoughts seem to settle within its comfy embrace.

name: Video Game Console
description: With its console, cartridges, and controller, any living room turns into a space of excitement. New adventures click from cartridge onto screen, a joyous bridge between the digital and the real.

name: Television
description: Within its solid frame lies a world both distant and familiar. A click of the dial brings flickering images slowly to life. It fills quiet nights with stories, glowing with muted light.

name: Arcade Machine
description: Twin joysticks spark tension between players. The noise of moves and buttons still echoes in the air. The machine carries a vivid and fleeting impression of simpler times.

name: Training Dummy
description: Your most loyal sparring partner, this dummy is crafted for combat and sword practice, poised with steady form. As you hone both skill and focus, each strike leaves its mark upon it.

name: Wooden Double Bed
description: The bed marks the location of one’s sanctum. With a sturdy wooden frame supporting soft, inviting bedding, it gently cuddles weary bodies and brings beautiful dreams.

name: Two-Tier Bookshelf
description: For the bibliophile who never has enough space for books, this wooden bookshelf is the perfect home for all the wisdom and stories found on pages old and new.

name: Dye Shelf
description: An array of dyes rest neatly on the shelves, pigments dried into delicate textures preserved by time, suggesting creative possibilities to come.

name: Art Tray
description: This wooden art tray keeps your paintbrushes, palettes and paint neatly in order, inspiring more creativity and color into your life.

name: Dome Floor Lamp
description: This modest floor lamp is the perfect reading partner at night. Whether next to a bed or near a desk, it will brighten any room.

name: Fireplace
description: This sleek fireplace casts a soft, steady flame, gently warming the room. It completes the ideal living room with a sense of comfort and coziness.

name: Wooden Altar
description: Though compact, this altar is made with excellent materials and a solid structure. Beautiful and sturdy, it is a calming addition to any home, the perfect place for offerings and prayers.

name: Typewriter
description: This beautiful classic is a favorite of any writer. Handmade with precision, every strike returns a satisfying click, its rhythm filling even the quietest room with life.

name: Chessboard
description: The neatly set pieces wait in silence for a game to begin, one where the smallest of moves can shift the balance. Like life, it isn’t about winning or losing, rather what our next step might be.

name: Wave-Pattern Carpet
description: This carpet would undoubtedly become the focus of any room, with its wave motif and calm colours. It’s perfect for the adventurer who wants a quiet reminder of their sea journeys.

name: Decorative Ship's Wheel
description: A must-have for every adventurer, this wooden ship’s wheel evokes a sense of journey. Stand next to it and become the captain of your ship, as you command your crew on your next voyage.

name: A Breath of Spring
description: Dawn breathes life into a new day. Pale crimson light and cool air drift through branches and leaves. Their tender swaying is almost audible through the canvas.

name: Summer's Bloom
description: A perfect moment as life awakens in a summer meadow in the morning. Dew rests on leaves and flowers, and petals open to greet the sun.

name: At Play
description: A mischievous kitten plays amidst a bed of flowers, reminding us to stay curious. This painting is a joyful addition to any room.

name: Sudden Rain
description: This painting invites meditation on the nature of passing events and the beautiful resilience in waiting, like flowers caught in a brief summer shower.

name: Autumn Peonies
description: Most peonies bloom in spring and enter dormancy in autumn. Here, peonies bloom in autumn, expressing life lived on its own terms.

name: Summer Flows to Autumn
description: A swap of colors turns foliage blue and the river ochre, playing with the change of seasons in this expressive piece.

name: Comfy Futon
description: A classic and comfortable futon. Just roll out and sink into cloudlike softness.

name: Sturdy Bed
description: Solid wood slats form the headboard and frame of this refined bed. A downy pillow and cover invite restful nights and slow, easy mornings.

name: Camera
description: This camera is compact and sturdy, able to withstand the knocks needed to get that perfect shot. A strap keeps it safe and attached, ready for adventures.

name: Terrarium
description: The ideal environment for your reptillian friends, this terrarium holds sand and stones ideal for lounging. A sun lamp keeps it cozy and warm.

name: Snowy View
description: This stunning piece of art portrays a sweeping view of a tree by snow-laden hills. Staring at it, an icy wind is almost perceptible.

name: Travel Backpack
description: Rugged and practical, this backpack has many compartments and straps. A bedroll rests on top, secured tightly. The seasoned traveler would never leave home without it.

name: Daruma Doll
description: An ancient symbol of good luck and resolve, this daruma doll will ensure your dreams come true.

name: Elegant Display Case
description: A sleek and refined piece of furniture, this is ideal for displaying household treasures. The glass door showcases items while also protecting them from dust and debris.

name: Cat Tree
description: Gift your cat companions this tree. Ideal for their climbing, clawing, and playing needs, it has multiple levels and toys to keep them entertained.

name: Noble Stool
description: An elegant stool, carved from the finest wood and covered with the softest fabric.

name: Compact Vanity
description: This practical and convenient vanity features an adjustable mirror and a drawer for all grooming essentials.

name: Desert Plant Display
description: Bring a small pocket of the desert home with you. This charming display of sand, stones, and succulents adds a touch of warmth and adventure to any room.

name: Blossom Silhouettes
description: This striking piece shows the silhouette of a tree and its blossoms. The flowers spread their petals like fans, giving the tree a decorative and refined air.

name: Elegant Display Bow
description: An ancient and refined bow. Carved by an expert bowyer, care and strength lie in every line. Its poised and ready for arrows, though its battle days are long over.

name: Elegant Display Arrow
description: This arrow is made with care and grace, no less precise for its beauty. It matches a bow made with similar reverence for archery.

name: Low Table
description: Delicately carved from wood, this low table can be placed anywhere in your home. A flexible and multi-function item, it lets you rearrange your space to suit your needs.

name: Basic Covered Table
description: Round and lightweight, this table is ready for any occasion. A striped tablecloth protects the wood from stains and heat.

name: Toaster
description: An essential utensil for any kitchen, this toaster is ready for any type of bread. The fragrance of perfectly-toasted bread makes the kitchen smell heavenly.

name: Guitar
description: Wonderful for any occasion, this guitar has a sleek and elegant curve in its body. Clear, gentle notes are plucked from the strings, sharing the gift of music.

name: Microphone with Stand
description: Essential for any singer, this microphone is held in an adjustable stand. It's lightweight for convenient transport, and is easy to set up.

name: Boombox
description: Bring the party with you wherever you go! This boombox has a casette player, radio function, and large speakers for sharing music with your friends.

name: Speaker
description: A standalone speaker ready to connect with your instruments or music player. The highest-quality sound spills from it, livening up the atmosphere.

name: Sound Mixer
description: A piece of equipment for the serious musician, this sound mixer can record, mix, and play different sounds at your whim. What will you create with it today?

name: Standing Keyboard
description: A great option for the home, this keyboard takes up less space than a piano yet provides a similar musical experience. Extra sound filters add range and variety to performances.

name: Kotatsu
description: The coziest table invented! This low-rise table fits neatly in any room, and comes with an inbuilt heater and blanket to keep you warm as you eat or play games.

name: Bonfire Manga Panels
description: Pages from a manga celebrating Seikyu's bonfire party. Seilyu's residents are immortalized in the panels.

name: Stately Drawers
description: A sturdy yet elegant chest of drawers. This is a sophisticated option for a bedside table or extra storage in a room.

name: Elegant Side Table
description: This side table wouldn't be out of place in a prince's sitting room! The finest leather and wood have been used, and the design is handcrafted by dedicated artisans.

name: Half-Tester Bed
description: The canopy over the headboard offers an extra touch of luxury and comfort to this bed. Sleep cocooned in the softest fabrics available.

name: Wavy Folding Screen
description: A useful and beautiful way to segment a room or provide some privacy. This folding screen is made of lightweight wood and fine paper in a traditional design.

name: Elegant Carpet
description: A carpet straight from a palace in a fairy tale, this is woven by hand using the richest thread. The carpet is soft and luxurious to step on, and adds a refined touch to any room.

name: Refined Desk
description: This long desk is ideal for a study or library. With ample space for books, papers, and anything else a home office needs, this desk is a thoughtful and dignified addition to a home.

name: Elegant Chair
description: A high-backed chair reminiscent of a throne, this chair has beautifully-crafted lines and a soft cushioned seat. A sophisticated piece of furniture for those with refined tastes.

name: Clock Yokai
description: A unique timepiece, this clock holds a living being. A surprising addition to any room.

name: Stately Leather Armchair
description: This refined and comfortable armchair adds a touch of sophistication and class to any room. Relax like royalty in its cushioned embrace.

name: Stately Leather Sofa
description: A refined option for seating your many friends in style and comfort. This sofa evokes the royal elegance of a richly-furnished palace.

name: Petal Light Fixture
description: The bulbs of these lights are petal-shaped, adding a beautiful yet understated atmosphere to the room. Let warmth and light radiate from above!

name: Dragon-Backed Mirror
description: A unique standing mirror for any home. This beautiful piece features a handpainted dragon design on the back.

name: Crane Carpet
description: This special carpet depicts cranes flying in a deep blue sky above a swirl of water. A meditative piece which adds a touch of elegance and calm to a room.

name: Kasa-obake
description: A special companion! A vivacious presence, this umbrella yokai provides ample shade. Just watch for its tongue!

name: Covered Round Table
description: A large and sturdy round table covered with two tableclothes. Ideal for events and occasions where a touch of elevation is required.

name: Burabura
description: An illuminating character in any room! This lantern yokai keeps a watchful eye on proceedings. Be sure to place in an appropriate place.

name: Stately Low Table
description: Design to accommodate a range of room shapes, this low and wide table is suitable to support other furniture and knick-knacks. A refined option for any home.

name: Elegantly Dishevelled Bed
description: This large bed is comfortable and crowned with a halo-effect headboard. Someone left the bedclothes in disarray, yet somehow the effect has a refined and languid charm.

name: Traditional Lamppost
description: This lamppost emits a warm, inviting light. Place it anywhere that needs a soft and guiding presence.

name: Bunk Beds
description: A practical use of vertical space, these bunk beds are sturdy yet comfortable. Sharing a room was never so fun!

name: Bamboo Trident
description: An unusual piece, this trident is made of the finest bamboo. A statement item that will surely start conversations at every party.

name: Spouse's Wardrobe
description: A special piece brought to hold all your spouse's clothes. Their own space in their new home, this wardrobe features anything a yokai needs to feel settled.

name: Weapon Care Kit
description: This traditional kit contains everything a warrior needs for maintaining their weapon. Oil, cloth, paper, and powder, packed neatly into a convenient size for easy transportation.

name: Bonsai Tree
description: The result of hours of careful tending, this bonsai tree is refined and beautiful. It invites reflection on the ability of nature to flourish and bend under guidance.

name: Reading Nook
description: This cozy and special reading nook has everything needed for the dedicated reader. Soft cushions, multiple books in easy reach, and space to stretch out.

name: Sakura Carpet
description: A sophisticated and elegant piece, this carpet is woven from the highest quality silks. Sakura flowers are depicted drifting on a spring evening.

name: Special Weapon Rack
description: This weapon rack holds the specially designed weapons by our Kickstarter supporters. An elegant thank you piece that will enliven any home.

name: Lantern Gate
description: Bring the Tsukimi Festival home with you with this superb gate. The lanterns' serene glow brightens every night.

name: Festival Lamp Post
description: A guiding light in the darkness, this lamp post from the Tsukimi Festival is a stalwart statement for any homestead.

name: Festival Lantern
description: A bright lantern that can be hung almost anywhere. The design is from the Tsukimi Festival, the autumn celebration of the moon goddess.

name: Rotten Item
description: A questionable substance shrouded in mystery... What could it be used for?

name: Carp
description: A common fish found in various waters with a long body, golden-yellow sides, and a grayish-white belly. Famous in Chinese folklore, it was the first fish to be farmed.

name: Crucian Carp
description: A common fish found in various waters with an oblong, laterally compressed body and a narrow belly. Domesticated ages ago, it's omnivorous and highly adaptable.

name: Shad
description: Commonly found in various waters during spring and summer. It has an oval body, flat sides, a blunt head, and a smooth back. Its delicious taste has made it a delicacy served to royalty.

name: Horse Mackerel
description: Commonly found in various waters during autumn and winter. With a spindle-shaped body, a bluish-green back and a silver belly, eating it stale can lead to food poisoning!

name: Mudskipper
description: A common fish found in various waters during spring. Their pectoral fins allow them to skip across muddy surfaces. During mating seasons, males "dance" to attract females.

name: Sweetfish
description: A common fish found in various waters during summer. They have a small pointed head, a blunt snout, and a white belly. Also known as "year fish" due to its one-year lifespan.

name: Sole
description: A common fish found in various waters during autumn. They have a long, flat, tongue-shaped body and no pectoral fins. Its shape reminds one of beef tongue bread.

name: Catfish
description: A common fish found in various waters during winter. They have a flat body and a soft belly that can expand. Those whiskers sure make them look like an old man...

name: Pufferfish
description: A common fish found in oceans and rivers year-round. Stubby body with external spines, puffs up when in danger. Despite being delicious, they are highly toxic: cook with care!

name: Black Bass
description: Commonly found in rivers during spring, summer, and autumn. An oblong, laterally compressed body, brown with black spots. Though not rare, they are still a satisfying catch.

name: Pond Loach
description: Commonly found in rivers during spring, summer, and autumn. They have a slender body with barbels at the mouth. Quite slippery to the touch...

name: Eel
description: A rare fish found in oceans and rivers during spring. Aggressive and voracious, adept at hiding in burrows. Eels are among the few fish capable of changing sex.

name: Bream
description: A rare fish found in rivers and ponds during summer. The name comes from its flat and wide shape. Its slow growth results in delicious meat rich in fat.

name: Salmon
description: A rare fish found in oceans and rivers during autumn and winter. Has a spindle-shaped body and orange-red flesh. A premium ingredient for sashimi; good for smoking as well.

name: Red Porgy
description: A rare fish found in the ocean during spring. Has an oblong body with an alluring red coloration. Breeds in warm seawater, but vanishes once temperatures drop.

name: Ocean Sunfish
description: A rare fish found in the ocean during summer. It has a laterally flattened body and can weigh up to three tons. A carefree fish, it likes sunbathing at the surface of the sea.

name: Lamprey
description: A rare fish found in oceans and rivers during autumn and winter. Has a slender body with a toothed, funnel-like sucking mouth. Dubbed "living fossil," it has retained ancient characteristics.

name: Tilapia
description: A rare fish found in rivers and ponds during spring. Highly adaptable and prolific, it's a formidable predator. Its presence can pose a threat to other aquatic species.

name: Noodlefish
description: A rare fish found in oceans and ponds during summer. Small in size, it has a slender body and white coloration. They move in schools and are sensitive to water quality.

name: River Crab
description: A rare aquatic species found in ponds during autumn and winter. They have a hard shell and move sideways with raised claws. Steamed River Crabs have always been a rare delicacy.

name: Sturgeon
description: A precious fish found in rivers on spring and summer days. One of the oldest fish, retaining prehistoric bone plate anatomy. Its expensive caviar sure is mouthwatering.

name: Swordfish
description: A precious ocean fish found on autumn and winter nights. Known for its flat, pointed bill that is sharp and sturdy.

name: Cuttlefish
description: A precious ocean species found on spring and summer days. It has soft tentacles and ink sacs to aid their escape. Can burst into astonishing speed when threatened.

name: Blobfish
description: A precious ocean fish found on autumn and winter nights. Its body collapses upon capture due to its special anatomy. It has been dubbed the saddest-looking fish.

name: Redmouth Culter
description: A precious fish found in ponds on spring and summer days. An upturned mouth, red fins, and a black line across its body. Anglers delight in catching this fish.

name: Rainbow Trout
description: A precious fish found in ponds during the day in autumn and winter. Sporting distinctive black spots and a vivid rainbow band running from head to tail fin, it's delicious and nutritious.

name: Gar
description: A precious fish found in rivers and ponds on rainy days in spring, summer and autumn. A ferocious predator, existing since prehistoric times.

name: Cod
description: A precious fish found in the ocean on rainy days. Low fat and high protein, it also yields valuable liver oil. Some regions even host cod festivals.

name: Siberian Taimen
description: A precious fish found in ponds on snowy winter days. It has an elongated body, a flat head, and a huge mouth. The "tiger" of freshwater fish, it eats smaller aquatic animals.

name: Golden Arowana
description: A legendary fish found in ponds on snowy winter mornings. Huge, flat, and covered in metallic scales. Known for its resemblance to the Chinese dragon.

name: Oarfish
description: A legendary fish found in the ocean on rainy autumn mornings. Characterized by its red, mane-like dorsal fin. The world's longest bony fish, it's said to predict earthquakes.

name: Ice Clam
description: A legendary aquatic species found in ponds on snowy nights. Its translucent shell encases tender clam meat. Hard to spot on snowy nights, catching it is a sign of good luck.

name: King Crab
description: A legendary ocean species found on rainy summer nights. Found in cold seas, they are actually a Lithodoidea species. Its colossal size truly lives up to its name.

name: Cutlassfish
description: A rare fish found in the ocean during summer. Like a silver ribbon, it has a long, flat, and scaleless body. Not particularly good swimmers, they often hunt in large groups.

name: Electric Ray
description: A rare fish found in the ocean on summer nights. It glides through the sea like a large shadow. Beware of the electric organs between its pectoral fins!

name: Lobster
description: Nicknamed dragon-prawn by the locals, this rare crustacean can be found in the sea on rainy days in spring, summer, and autumn. Its sweet and delicious meat is ideal for gourmet dishes.

name: Crystal Shrimp
description: Native to the shallow sea mud in spring, summer and autumn, this delicate crustacean is crystal clear when fresh. Cooked, it is meaty and sweet, perfect for sushi, sashimi, or just braised in oil.

name: Kappa's Cucumber
description: Stylish and practical, no one expects the Cane Sword to also be lethal. Yohji is never seen without it.

name: Test Quest Item
description: Test Quest Item

name: Small Coop
description:
Small Coop.
Accommodates a few chicks, ideal for beginners.

name: Medium Coop
description:
Medium Coop.
Accommodates a moderate number of chicks, for advanced users.

name: Large Coop
description:
Large Coop.
Accommodates many chicks, for professional breeders.

name: Small Barn
description:
Small Barn.
Accommodates a few cows, suitable for beginners.

name: Medium Barn
description:
Medium Barn.
Accommodates a moderate number of cows, for advanced users.

name: Large Barn
description:
Large Barn.
Accommodates many cows, for professionals.

name: Small Animal Den
description: The perfect home for a few capybara and red panda companions.

name: Medium Animal Den
description: This is great if the number of your capybara and red panda companions is growing.

name: Large Animal Den
description: This is a sanctuary for all your capybaras' and red pandas' needs.

name: Capybara Hot Springs
description: The ultimate capybara treat - the way to your furry companions' hearts.

name: Silo
description:
A tall structure for thatch storage.
Automatically fills as you collect thatch outdoors. Thatch is then transferred to the fodder box.

name: Chicken
description: A unique breed of poultry from Seikyu. With care, it provides endless eggs.

name: Goat
description: Unique breed of livestock from Seikyu. With care, it provides endless wool.

name: Monster House
description: The ideal new home for your tamed monsters! Build this to give them a safe place to live on your farm.

name: Cow
description: Unique breed of livestock from Seikyu. With care, it provides endless milk.

name: Capybara
description: A unique breed of livestock from Seikyu. With careful care, it can provide a steady supply of golden droppings.

name: Ibis
description: A unique breed of livestock from Seikyu. With careful care, it can provide a steady supply of ibis eggs.

name: Red Panda
description: Everyone loves the red panda, with its fluffy reddish-brown fur and gentle nature. It lives together with the capybara and knows how to enjoy the slow, everyday moments in life.

name: Bao
description: A special friend for Seikyu's special friends! A loyal dog who enjoys lying in the sun and belly rubs.

name: Marbles
description: A special friend for Seikyu's special friends! Mischievous and sweet, always ready for treats - who can resist this cat?

name: Torg
description: A special friend for Seikyu's special friends! Every farmhouse needs a ginger cat, and this one is happiest when there are fields to run through and treats to eat.

name: Pillow
description: A special friend for Seikyu's special friends! This spirit enjoys hugs and adventures. Keep your third eye and your heart open to this unique pet!

name: Tusser
description: A special friend for Seikyu's special friends! This legendary pet might look like soot mites, but they love little more than treats after a long day playing in the sun.

name: Small Coop Construction Kit
description: Place this kit to start construction. Sasaki will come by when he is available the next morning to help you build it.

name: Medium Coop Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your coop to a medium one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Large Coop Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your coop to a large one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Small Barn Construction Kit
description: Place this kit to start construction. Sasaki will come by when he is available the next morning to help you build it.

name: Medium Barn Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your barn to a medium one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Large Barn Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your barn to a large one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Small Animal Den Construction Kit
description: Place this kit to start construction. Sasaki will come by when he is available the next morning to help you build it.

name: Medium Animal Den Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your hut to a medium one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Large Animal Den Upgrade Kit
description: This kit upgrades your hut to a large one. Place to start the construction, and Sasaki will help complete it the next morning.

name: Monster House Tool Kit
description: The specialized toolbox needed to construct monster houses. Use this to build a dedicated living space for tamed monsters on your farm.

name: Animal Treats
description: Animals love this snack, and they just need one a day.

name: Frog Headgear
description: Who could resist this cute green face? Give your pet a spring to their step with this adorable frog hat, or try it on for yourself when you're in your animal form!

name: Little Yellow Duck
description: Your pet can bring bathtime fun with them by wearing this cute yellow duck! A quackin’ good day is guaranteed with this hat.

name: Propeller Cap
description: Pure nostalgia in a hat, this propeller cap adds a touch of youth and fun to every pet. Your pet will be extra eye-catching in this, like a bamboo dragonfly.

name: Christmas Hat
description: ‘Tis the season, and even your pet can join the celebrations! This Christmas Hat adds festive fun to everyone’s day.

name: Whetstone
description: Perfect for sharpening weapons and tools, the whetstone is a must-have in all yokai households.

name: Mysterious Box
description: What's really inside?

name: Pet Super Treat
description: A premium snack prepared exclusively for pet adoption. Entice pets into your home by giving them this after reaching 5 hearts of affection. Ideal for growing your farmhouse family!

name: Backpack Expansion
description: Increases Inventory capacity by 5 slots upon acquisition.

name: Pet Flute
description: A melodious flute that draws a pet’s attention. If the pet trusts the one playing it enough, it will happily follow along.

name: Pet Den
description: A cozy resting spot loved by all pets. Maybe they dream of human-shaped foxes while they sleep...

name: Oni
description: A common monster which roams Seikyu and beyond, oni are fierce fighters. They're not the brightest, however... charm them and keep them on your farm.

name: Blue Oni
description: Blue oni are noted among oni for being exceptional warriors. They like to lurk underground in the ruins and guard treasure.

name: Stone Statue
description: Stone statues shoot arrows at anyone who gets too close. With some love and affection, maybe they can learn to change their ways.

name: Puppet Oni
description: Surprisingly lethal, puppet oni were created to cause chaos with their timed strikes. With someone else pulling their strings, they might learn new skills instead.

name: Slime
description: Deceptively round and cute, slimes are common sights near water sources. With time, perhaps the slime can be tamed to be as sweet as the teardrop cake it resembles.

name: Man-Eating Plant
description: A different kind of monster, these plants lash out at anyone who comes near. Not to be confused for ordinary crops and plants!

name: Abura-sumashi
description: Known for their fiery tempers and excellent hand-eye coordination, abura-sumashi make great guards. Their tenacity and fearlessness are an asset to those who grow to know them.

name: Mekurabe
description: A great and fearsome monster composed of many skulls combined into one great head. Don't try to win a staring contest against it!

name: Little Skull
description: This little skull isn't so bad once it's been tamed. In fact, it's even kind of cute...

name: Shadowblade Oni
description: A legendary warrior among the oni, the shadowblade oni uses a sword crafted from the darkest of shadows. Ensure they're kept active and entertained.

name: Pale Puppet
description: This puppet is metallic and cold to the touch. They do warm up once they get close to people. Just watch out for those spinning blades!

name: Mud Slime
description: The mud slime is often found near underground water sources. Don't underestimate this unique type of slime!

name: Sword Oni
description: A particularly cutting rank of oni, the sword oni lives and breathes weapons. Make sure it has plenty of toys to play with.

name: Nioh
description: This powerful monster hides its face behind a decorated mask. It enjoys walks through bamboo and trees, and is a strong guardian.

name: Withered Stone Golem
description: These ancient stone golems are bad-tempered and strong as mountains. Treat them well, and they'll be loyal for life.

name: Wild Boar
description: A famous and feared wild animal, wild boars are known for their strong and swift attacks. Stay clear of their tusks!

name: Stone Golem
description: Golems are heavy-hitting monsters, large and ferocious. Their precious golem cores glisten in their chests, and have myriad uses beyond powering them.

name: Spear-Wielding Oni
description: These oni are quite common and known for their spear attacks. Watch out for the pointy end!

name: Walking Man-Eating Plant
description: Uh-oh! This type of carnivorous plant can uproot itself and move around. Keep an eye on those chompers.

name: Dark Fox Wraith
description: Formed from the condensed evil power of the Dark Fox, this wraith can claw you at close range and launch a dark fireball from far away.

name: Arrow Statue
description: Like stone statues, arrow statues shoot ranged arrows at anyone who gets close. They excel at motion-detection and home security.
